title: The erasure of Galactic bar resonances by dark matter subhaloes
comment: 20 pages, 15 figures, submitted to MNRAS. Comments welcome!
summary: In the context of increasing appreciation for the coupling between the Galactic bar and the halo, we introduce a new framework using stars trapped in resonance with the bar to probe the Galactic dark matter subhalo population. Since resonant stars occupy a finite width in action space, perturbations from subhaloes can shift a star's actions beyond this width, causing them to circulate out of resonance. Physically, the dark substructure in the Milky Way may dissolve, puff-up, or re-order the resonance features in the stellar halo. To explore the utility of this framework, we treat individual encounters in the impulse approximation and model their cumulative effect as diffusion in the relevant action. The resulting diffusion coefficient allows us to link the survival of resonant populations to the subhalo mass function, whose properties depend on the particle nature of dark matter. Test particle integration validates the impulse treatment for low-mass subhaloes and quantifies its regime of applicability. For a Milky Way-like bar, we find individual subhaloes with $M<10^7$ M$_{\odot}$ have negligible impact on stars in co-rotation resonance, where as the full cold dark matter (CDM) population could erase the resonance over the bar's lifetime. The persistence of resonances therefore implies a suppression of the local subhalo density to less than 1/3 of CDM expectations, consistent with tidal disruptions and previous literature. The narrow widths of higher-order resonances will increase the constraining power of this framework, and therefore motivates searches for bar-resonant halo features in observational data.

AI.tldr: 提出利用银河系棒（Galactic bar）共振俘获恒星探测暗物质子晕（subhalo）的新方法，发现冷暗物质（CDM）模型预测的子晕群会完全破坏共转共振（co-rotation resonance），而观测到的共振持续存在表明本地子晕密度需低于CDM预期的1/3。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于银河系棒（Galactic bar）与暗物质晕（halo）的耦合机制，通过共振俘获恒星探测暗物质子晕（subhalo）分布及其对暗物质粒子性质的约束。
AI.data: 数据来源包括银河系棒（Galactic bar）共振捕获的恒星动力学模拟（test particle integration）和冷暗物质（CDM）子晕质量函数的理论模型。
AI.method: 采用共振恒星动力学模型和脉冲近似（impulse approximation）方法，结合作用量扩散（diffusion in action）理论分析暗物质子晕对银河系棒共振结构的影响。
AI.result: result：银河系棒状结构（Galactic bar）与暗物质亚晕（subhalo）相互作用导致共振恒星（resonant stars）扩散，冷暗物质（CDM）模型预期的亚晕群可完全消除共转共振（co-rotation resonance），而实际观测到的共振持续存在表明局部亚晕密度需低于CDM预期的1/3。

title: The dark fate of ultra-faint dwarfs: gravothermal collapse in action
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures + appendix
summary: Ultra-faint dwarf (UFD) galaxies are a promising probe for dark matter (DM) physics as they are the most DM-dominated systems known. The Milky Way (MW) hosts many UFDs for which the properties of their DM distribution have been inferred from measurements of their stellar kinematics. If DM has self-interactions beyond gravity, the UFD halos may undergo a gravothermal evolution, giving rise to a population of galaxies with more diverse DM density profiles. We investigate DM densities of MW UFDs in self-interacting dark matter (SIDM) models, with an aim of determining the stage of gravothermal evolution for their halos. Therefore, we employ idealised high-resolution SIDM N-body simulations targeted to a MW-like system and compare the properties of simulated satellites to those of the observed UFDs. We find that the gravothermal evolution of SIDM halos produces diverse DM distributions, aligning with observations of the MW UFDs. Most of the UFDs have high DM densities, indicating that their halos have passed the period of maximum core expansion and entered the collapse phase, i.e., their central density may increase with time. The depth to which they have evolved into the gravothermal collapse may vary strongly across the satellites. This allows SIDM to account for the diversity in their DM densities. Moreover, the acceleration of the gravothermal evolution by tidal stripping goes hand-in-hand with explaining the diversity of the UFDs, as the ones with smaller pericentre distances require having evolved further into the gravothermal catastrophe. Large SIDM cross-sections of $σ/ m_χ\approx$ 80 cm$^2$ g$^{-1}$ at a velocity of $v \approx$ 20 km s$^{-1}$ are plausible, as the halo densities of MW UFDs are consistent with the gravothermal evolution predicted in SIDM, with most of them being in the collapse phase.

AI.tldr: 研究发现自相互作用暗物质(SIDM)模型中银河系超暗弱矮星系(UFD)的暗物质晕经历了引力热演化，产生多样化的密度分布，多数处于坍缩阶段，支持大截面(80 cm²/g)的SIDM模型。
AI.background: 研究探讨了超暗弱矮星系（UFD）作为暗物质（DM）物理探针的潜力，重点关注暗物质自相互作用（SIDM）模型下暗物质晕的引力热演化如何解释银河系（MW）UFDs暗物质密度分布的多样性。
AI.data: 研究中使用了针对类似银河系系统的高分辨率自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）N体模拟数据。
AI.method: 采用理想化的高分辨率自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）N体模拟方法，针对类似银河系的系统进行研究。
AI.result: 自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）模型中晕的引力热演化产生了与观测相符的多样化暗物质分布，多数超暗弱矮星系（UFD）已进入核心坍缩阶段且中心密度可能随时间增加。

title: When self-similarity meets mass spectrum and anisotropy
comment: 5 pages + 3 appendicies (no figures or tables but lots of equations); accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Self-similar evolution is widely used in the theory of collisional stellar dynamics, but its applicability to systems with multiple stellar masses is not well established. We investigate the structural stability of self-similar evolution in multi-mass star clusters and assess the roles of mass segregation and velocity anisotropy. Using a gaseous-model approximation, we develop a theoretical framework to describe the response of a self-similar background to mass-dependent perturbations with isotropic and anisotropic velocity distributions. We show analytically that mass-dependent relaxation leads to a separation of characteristic similarity scales and renders the single-scale solution structurally unstable. In the presence of velocity anisotropy, this similarity-breaking instability splits into distinct radial and tangential modes whose growth rates are modified in a direction-dependent manner. Radial anisotropy reduces the instability through enhanced radial kinetic support, whereas tangential anisotropy increases the effective growth rates and enables faster central evolution. In systems with a mass spectrum, this instability drives mass segregation and the emergence of a multi-scale, near-homologous evolution. Together, these results place self-similar evolution in a consistent theoretical context for collisional star clusters with multiple stellar masses and anisotropic velocity distributions.

AI.tldr: 研究发现多质量星团（multi-mass star clusters）中质量依赖的弛豫过程会导致特征相似尺度分离，使单尺度自相似演化（self-similar evolution）结构不稳定，且在速度各向异性（velocity anisotropy）影响下该不稳定性分裂为径向和切向模式，分别通过增强径向动能支撑或加速中心演化来调控质量分层（mass segregation）和多尺度准同源演化（near-homologous evolution）的形成。
AI.background: 研究探讨了自相似演化（self-similar evolution）理论在具有多恒星质量且速度分布各向异性（anisotropic velocity distributions）的碰撞星团（collisional star clusters）中的结构稳定性问题。
AI.data: 采用气体模型近似（gaseous-model approximation）构建理论框架，分析各向同性与各向异性速度分布下多质量恒星团的自相似背景对质量依赖性扰动的响应。
AI.method: 采用气体模型近似（gaseous-model approximation）理论框架分析多质量星团自相似演化对质量依赖扰动的响应，并研究各向同性与各向异性速度分布的影响。
AI.result: 质量依赖的弛豫过程导致特征相似标度分离，使单标度解在结构上不稳定。

title: Beyond21: A Global Framework for Cosmic Dawn and Reionization Within and Beyond the Standard Model
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures
summary: Observations of the Cosmic Dawn (CD) and Epoch of Reionization (EoR) are steadily improving, opening new opportunities to study early galaxies through complementary probes. To enable consistent interpretation of these observations, we present Beyond21, a fully open-source Python package that implements flexible prescriptions for Pop II and Pop III star formation and computes the resulting radiation backgrounds and their impact on the intergalactic medium. From this coupled evolution, Beyond21 predicts the global 21-cm signal, UV luminosity functions (UVLFs), the ionization history, and the contribution to the observed cosmic X-ray background (CXB) within a single, self-consistent pipeline. A full global evolution run executes in $\sim0.1 \ {\rm s}$ on a single CPU core, enabling broad, high-resolution parameter exploration. The modular architecture facilitates straightforward modification of astrophysical prescriptions and the incorporation of new physics. As an illustrative example, we implement a scenario in which a small fraction of dark matter is millicharged, leading to baryon cooling through elastic interactions.

AI.tldr: 开发了开源Python工具包Beyond21，通过统一框架模拟宇宙黎明（CD）和再电离时期（EoR）中第二星族（Pop II）与第三星族（Pop III）恒星形成对21厘米信号、紫外光度函数（UVLFs）、电离历史及X射线背景（CXB）的影响，并演示了毫电荷暗物质导致重子冷却的案例。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于宇宙黎明（Cosmic Dawn, CD）和再电离时期（Epoch of Reionization, EoR）的多波段观测数据一致性解释，开发了开源工具Beyond21以模拟早期星系形成及其对星际介质的辐射影响。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源为模拟数据（simulation data），通过Beyond21这一开源Python软件包实现，该软件包采用灵活的Pop II和Pop III恒星形成模型，并计算由此产生的辐射背景及其对星系际介质的影响。
AI.method: 采用模块化架构的Python软件包Beyond21，通过自洽耦合演化计算实现恒星形成（Pop II和Pop III）的灵活参数化建模，并预测21厘米信号、紫外光度函数（UVLFs）、电离历史及X射线背景（CXB）贡献。
AI.result: 开发了开源Python工具包Beyond21，可自洽计算宇宙黎明（CD）和再电离时期（EoR）的21厘米信号、紫外光度函数（UVLFs）、电离历史及X射线背景（CXB）贡献。

title: The Drivers of Cosmic Dust Temperature Evolution
comment: 13 pages, main results in Fig. 3 and 4. Submitted to A&A, comments welcome
summary: Observations of the rest-frame far-infrared (far-IR) emission of galaxies suggest a mild increase of dust temperature $T_{\rm dust}$ with redshift, although constraining $T_{\rm dust}$ in high-redshift systems remains challenging due to limited sampling of the far-IR spectral energy distribution (SED). We present and discuss the redshift evolution of $T_{\rm dust}$ predicted by a cosmological galaxy evolution simulation with dust treatment, and interpret its dependence on other galaxy physical properties. We use a semi-analytic model of galaxy formation that includes an explicit treatment of dust, post-processed with radiative transfer. Dust temperatures are derived by applying modified blackbody SED fitting to the simulated galaxies, mirroring the methodology adopted in most observational studies. The dust temperature of simulated galaxies increases with redshift, in broad agreement with observational results. A feature-importance analysis reveals that the star formation rate surface density $Σ_{\rm SFR}$ and the dust-to-gas ratio (DTG) are the main drivers of dust temperature, tracing the intensity of the interstellar radiation field and the optical depth of warm molecular clouds, respectively. Galaxies with higher star formation rate surface density and lower DTGs $-$ common conditions at high$-z$ $-$ are associated with warmer dust. We provide a simple relation to estimate DTG from $Σ_{\rm SFR}$, $T_{\rm dust}$, and redshift. Variations in dust grain size and chemical composition have a negligible impact on $T_{\rm dust}$. Our results are particularly relevant to the study of dust properties with observations of high-z galaxies, where far-IR dust emission is not fully sampled.

AI.tldr: 基于宇宙学星系演化模拟和尘埃处理，研究发现星系尘埃温度（dust temperature）随红移升高而增加，主要由恒星形成率面密度（star formation rate surface density）和尘埃气体比（dust-to-gas ratio）驱动，其中高红移下高恒星形成率面密度和低尘埃气体比的星系具有更暖的尘埃温度，并提供了由恒星形成率面密度、尘埃温度和红移估算尘埃气体比的简单关系。
AI.background: 研究探讨了星系尘埃温度（dust temperature）随红移（redshift）演化的规律及其与恒星形成率面密度（star formation rate surface density）和尘埃-气体比（dust-to-gas ratio）等物理性质的关系。
AI.data: 数据来源于经过辐射传输后处理的半解析星系形成模型（semi-analytic model of galaxy formation），该模型包含显式尘埃处理，并通过修正黑体光谱能量分布（SED）拟合方法从模拟星系中导出尘埃温度（dust temperature）。
AI.method: 采用半解析星系形成模型结合尘埃处理及辐射传输后处理，通过修正黑体光谱能量分布拟合方法计算尘埃温度。
AI.result: 尘埃温度（dust temperature）随红移增加而升高，主要由恒星形成率面密度（star formation rate surface density）和尘埃-气体比（dust-to-gas ratio）驱动，前者反映星际辐射场强度，后者反映暖分子云光学厚度。

title: Probing Dark Energy on the Moon
comment: 9 pages with 3 figures, comments very welcome !
summary: The effective field theory (EFT) of cosmic acceleration provides a model-independent framework for describing dark energy and modified gravity, yet many of its defining operators remain weakly constrained by existing observations. We show that measurements of horizon-scale metric fluctuations with a lunar laser interferometer can directly probe the kinetic sector of the EFT of dark energy, enabling constraints on operators governing scalar perturbation dynamics rather than only the background expansion history. In particular, we demonstrate sensitivity to the EFT kinetic coefficient $M_2^4$ and the associated sound speed of dark energy, $c_s^2$. This establishes a qualitatively new observational handle on the microphysical consistency conditions of late-time acceleration models, allowing broad regions of EFT parameter space to be probed, constrained, or potentially discovered.

AI.tldr: 月球激光干涉仪通过测量视界尺度（horizon-scale）的度规涨落，首次直接探测了暗能量有效场论（EFT）的动力学部分，特别是约束了动能系数M₂⁴和声速cₛ²，为检验晚期宇宙加速模型的微观物理一致性提供了新方法。
AI.background: 研究背景聚焦于利用宇宙加速的有效场理论（EFT）框架独立于模型地描述暗能量和修正引力，并探索现有观测对其动力学算子的约束不足问题。
AI.data: data来源为月球激光干涉仪（lunar laser interferometer）对宇宙加速有效场论（EFT）中视界尺度（horizon-scale）度规涨落的测量数据。
AI.method: 采用月球激光干涉仪测量视界尺度度规涨落，直接探测暗能量有效场论（EFT）动力学部分，重点约束控制标量扰动动力学的算子（如动能系数M₂⁴和声速cₛ²）。
AI.result: 月球激光干涉仪测量可有效约束宇宙加速有效场论（EFT）的动力学系数M₂⁴和暗能量声速cₛ²，为微物理一致性条件提供新观测手段。

title: Low-resolution spectroscopic characterisation of five poorly known Galactic stellar clusters
comment: Main paper: 9 pages and 4 figures. Appendix: 6 pages and 4 figures. Submitted to A&A
summary: Stellar clusters preserve crucial information on the formation and evolutionary processes that shaped the Milky Way (MW) as we see it today. Yet, several MW clusters still lack sufficient data to constrain their metallicity, ages, and, in some cases, even their basic kinematic properties. We present low-resolution MODS@LBT spectroscopy for five such systems (i.e. Koposov 1, Koposov 2, Muñoz 1, Pfleiderer 2, and RLGC2) from which we derive systemic line-of-sight velocities ($V_{\rm sys}$) with typical uncertainties of $10-20$ km/s per star, and metallicities based on the equivalent widths of the infrared Ca II triplet measured in red giant branch members. For Pfleiderer 2 and RLGC2, we provide the first spectroscopic determinations of their systemic velocities and metallicities, finding $V_{\rm sys}= 3 \pm 3$ km/s and $-316 \pm 4$ km/s, and $\mathrm{[Fe/H]}= -0.76 \pm 0.09$ dex and $-2.33 \pm 0.04$ dex, respectively. For the other three clusters we find results consistent with the existing literature. Thanks to our new spectroscopic measurements, we perform an orbital analysis to investigate their origin. We find that Pfleiderer 2 likely formed within the MW, RLGC2 is dynamically associated to the Gaia-Sausage-Enceladus accretion event, Koposov 1 was likely stripped from the Sagittarius dwarf spheroidal, while Muñoz 1 is only tentatively associated with the latter system. In the end, Koposov 2 at high orbital energy does not show a clear association with any known progenitor system.

AI.tldr: 通过低分辨率光谱分析五个银河系星团（Koposov 1、Koposov 2、Muñoz 1、Pfleiderer 2和RLGC2）的系统视向速度（$V_{\rm sys}$）和金属丰度（$\mathrm{[Fe/H]}$），首次测定Pfleiderer 2和RLGC2的动力学参数，并结合轨道分析揭示RLGC2与盖亚-香肠-恩克拉多斯（Gaia-Sausage-Enceladus）并合事件相关，Koposov 1可能源自人马座矮球状星系（Sagittarius dwarf spheroidal），而Muñoz 1与该星系关联性较弱，Koposov 2未显示与任何已知前身系统的明确关联。
AI.background: 恒星团簇保存了塑造现今银河系(MW)形成和演化过程的关键信息。
AI.data: 数据来源于低分辨率MODS@LBT光谱仪对五个恒星系统（Koposov 1、Koposov 2、Muñoz 1、Pfleiderer 2和RLGC2）的观测，通过测量红巨星分支成员的红外Ca II三重线等效宽度获取视向速度（$V_{\rm sys}$）和金属丰度。
AI.method: 采用低分辨率MODS@LBT光谱技术测量五个星团的视向速度（$V_{\rm sys}$）和基于红外Ca II三重线等效宽度的金属丰度（$\mathrm{[Fe/H]}$），并利用轨道分析追溯其起源。
AI.result: 基于低分辨率光谱测量首次确定了Pfleiderer 2和RLGC2的系统性视向速度（$V_{\rm sys}$）和金属丰度（$\mathrm{[Fe/H]}$），分别为$3 \pm 3$ km/s和$-316 \pm 4$ km/s，$-0.76 \pm 0.09$ dex和$-2.33 \pm 0.04$ dex。

title: STOchastic LAttice Simulation of hybrid inflation
comment: 21 pages, 7 figures
summary: We investigate the spatial profile of the curvature perturbation generated in multi-waterfall hybrid inflation models, which are known to produce various topological defects. Using the lattice simulation code \acl{STOLAS}, based on the stochastic formalism of inflation, we analyse six cases by varying the number of waterfall fields $n$ and the functional form of the inflaton potential (``Quadratic'' and ``Cubic'' cases). Our statistical analysis shows that the \acp{PDF} and power spectra are broadly consistent with the so-called stochastic-$δN$ algorithm. The ``Cubic'' case also exhibits a characteristic upper bound in the \ac{PDF}, as discovered in our previous work, that suppresses \acl{PBH} formation while potentially affecting halo formation. Furthermore, we employ the Euler characteristic as a topological diagnostic tool to identify the structures of the waterfall fields as well as the curvature perturbation. We find that the topological defects, such as domain walls ($n=1$), cosmic strings ($n=2$), and monopoles ($n=3$), are reconnected during inflation into finer structures by the stochastic noise, making their correlation lengths much smaller than the Hubble scale at the critical point of the waterfall phase transition counterintuitively. The Euler characteristic also implies global structures of the curvature perturbation for $n=1$, though we do not conclude if they are due to the domain wall, because neither the strings ($n=2$) nor monopoles ($n=3$) leave such structures. The global structures of the curvature perturbation will provide a novel probe for the physics of the early universe.

AI.tldr: 通过晶格模拟和拓扑分析发现，多瀑布场混合暴胀模型（multi-waterfall hybrid inflation）中随机噪声会将拓扑缺陷（如畴壁、宇宙弦和单极子）重连为远小于哈勃尺度的精细结构，并揭示n=1时曲率扰动存在独特的全局结构特征。
AI.background: 研究主题为多瀑布场混合暴胀模型中曲率扰动的空间分布特征及其与拓扑缺陷（如畴壁、宇宙弦和磁单极子）的关联机制。
AI.data: 研究使用了基于随机暴胀形式论的晶格模拟代码STOLAS，通过改变瀑布场数量n和暴胀势函数形式（"Quadratic"和"Cubic"两种情况）对六种案例进行了分析。
AI.method: 采用基于随机暴胀形式论的晶格模拟代码STOLAS分析多瀑布场混合暴胀模型的空间曲率扰动分布。
AI.result: result：多瀑布混合暴胀模型中曲率扰动的空间分布分析表明，拓扑缺陷（如畴壁（n=1）、宇宙弦（n=2）和单极子（n=3））在暴胀期间被随机噪声重新连接为更精细结构，使其关联长度远小于瀑布相变临界点的哈勃尺度；欧拉示性数还揭示了n=1时曲率扰动的全局结构，这为早期宇宙物理提供了新探测手段。

title: Parameter estimation of eccentric massive black hole binaries with LISA and its cosmological implications
comment: 21 pages, 17 figures
summary: Future space-based gravitational wave (GW) observatories such as LISA will detect massive black hole binaries (MBHBs), which are expected to be accompanied by electromagnetic counterparts, thereby providing bright standard sirens for cosmology. The orbital eccentricity of MBHBs can significantly improve the parameter estimation of GWs because the multiple harmonics induced by eccentricity provide additional information and help break down the degeneracies among waveform parameters. In this paper, we use the EccentricFD waveform and construct 5-year GW event catalogs for LISA under three population models (popIII, Q3d and Q3nod). For the three models, we find that an initial eccentricity of $e_0=0.4$ at $10^{-4}$ Hz yields improvements in sky localization and distance inference by a factor of $\mathcal{O}(10)$ in the best cases. As a consequence, the average number of bright sirens increases substantially: from 8 to 11 (PopIII), 6 to 12 (Q3d) and 13 to 24 (Q3nod). This increase in event number, together with enhanced localization and distance inference, leads to tighter cosmological constraints. In the $Λ$CDM model, for instance, the relative uncertainty on $H_0$ is reduced from $8.17\%$ to $4.35\%$ for the Q3d model, corresponding to an improvement of approximately $47\%$. We also investigate the improvement in constraints on the dark energy equation of state and modified GW propagation when combining bright sirens with the latest cosmic microwave background data. These results demonstrate that eccentricity is a remarkably significant feature in GW detection and parameter estimation, enabling more accurate measurements of the Universe with future space-based observatories.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大质量黑洞双星（MBHBs）的轨道偏心率（eccentricity）能显著提升LISA对引力波（GWs）参数估计精度，通过增加谐波信息打破参数简并性，使三种模型（popIII、Q3d、Q3nod）下定位精度和距离推断提升约10倍，亮汽笛（bright sirens）事件数增加50%-85%，并将Q3d模型中哈勃常数（H0）相对不确定度从8.17%降至4.35%，暗能量状态方程和修正引力波传播的约束也同步增强。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用空间引力波(GW)探测器（如LISA）观测具有轨道偏心率(eccentricity)的大质量黑洞双星(MBHB)及其电磁对应体，以提升宇宙学参数测量精度。
AI.data: 使用EccentricFD波形并基于三种种群模型（popIII、Q3d和Q3nod）构建了LISA的5年引力波事件目录。
AI.method: 采用EccentricFD波形模型并构建三种不同种群模型（popIII、Q3d和Q3nod）下的5年LISA引力波事件目录。
AI.result: 初始轨道偏心率为0.4（10^-4 Hz）显著提升了LISA对MBHBs（massive black hole binaries）的定位精度和距离推断能力，使三种模型（popIII、Q3d、Q3nod）的明亮标准汽笛（bright standard sirens）平均数量分别增至11、12、24例，并将Q3d模型下H_0的相对不确定度从8.17%降至4.35%。

title: The Far-Ultraviolet Extragalactic Legacy (FUEL) Survey: Hubble Far-UV Images and Catalogs of the Extragalactic Legacy Fields
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to ApJS. Accompanies a MAST HLSP release (DOI: 10.17909/2yqw-3g14)
summary: We present far-ultraviolet (FUV) images and catalogs from the Hubble Space Telescope (HST) Advanced Camera for Surveys/Solar Blind Channel (ACS/SBC) F150LP (about 1600 Angstrom) of three extragalactic fields: GOODS-S, GOODS-N, and COSMOS. The data comprise 365 orbits of high-resolution imaging of 151 pointings covering an area of 44.7 square arcmin to typical depths of FUV about 28.7 AB (3-sigma, 0.5 arcsec diameter aperture). We provide a new model of the spatially varying dark "glow" created from all 365 orbits of data, and scale and subtract it from all pointings. We provide drizzled image mosaics, weight maps, and exposure time maps matched in coordinates and pixel scale to the Hubble Legacy Fields (HLF) frame, and the original COSMOS tiles. Galaxy photometry is measured within isophotes defined with existing deep Hubble F606W or F814W optical filters. We detect 1068 galaxies and provide catalogs of all optical detections, including matched IDs to existing 3D-HST and CANDELS catalogs. The redshift distribution of FUV-detected galaxies peaks at z about 0.6 and declines to z = 1.2, where the Lyman limit shifts redward of any filter transmission. These data fill the redshift gap of high-resolution far-UV imaging between z about 0 and z > 1, enabling studies of star-forming regions, dust properties, the FUV extragalactic background, and Lyman continuum emission from galaxies at z > 1.2.

AI.tldr: 利用哈勃太空望远镜（HST）的先进巡天相机/太阳盲通道（ACS/SBC）在远紫外波段（FUV，约1600埃）对GOODS-S、GOODS-N和COSMOS三个外场进行高分辨率成像观测，获得了1068个星系的光度测量数据，填补了红移（redshift）z≈0到z>1之间高分辨率远紫外成像的空白，为研究恒星形成区、尘埃特性、远紫外河外背景及红移z>1.2星系的莱曼连续谱发射提供了关键数据。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用哈勃太空望远镜（HST）先进巡天相机/太阳盲通道（ACS/SBC）在远紫外波段（FUV）对三个河外星场（GOODS-S、GOODS-N和COSMOS）进行高分辨率成像，填补了红移（redshift）在0至1.2之间高分辨率远紫外观测的空白。
AI.data: 数据来源于哈勃太空望远镜（HST）高级巡天相机/太阳盲通道（ACS/SBC）F150LP（约1600埃）对三个河外场（GOODS-S、GOODS-N和COSMOS）的365轨道高分辨率成像观测，覆盖面积44.7平方角分，典型深度为FUV约28.7 AB（3σ，0.5角秒直径孔径）。
AI.method: 采用哈勃太空望远镜（HST）高级巡天相机/太阳盲通道（ACS/SBC）F150LP滤光片（约1600埃）获取远紫外（FUV）图像数据，并通过365轨高分辨率成像覆盖44.7平方角分区域，典型深度达FUV约28.7 AB（3σ，0.5角秒直径孔径）。
AI.result: 利用哈勃太空望远镜（HST）ACS/SBC F150LP滤光片对GOODS-S、GOODS-N和COSMOS三个外场进行了365轨高分辨率远紫外（FUV）成像观测，覆盖44.7平方角分区域，典型深度达28.7 AB星等（3σ，0.5角秒孔径）。

title: Sound Mode and Scale-Dependent Growth in Two-Fluid Dynamical Dark Energy
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures
summary: We investigate the effects of dynamical dark energy (DDE) on the growth of cosmic structure using a two-fluid model. This framework allows the dark energy equation of state to smoothly cross the phantom divide, in agreement with recent DESI results. In this effective description, DDE supports propagating perturbations that behave like sound waves. These perturbations induce a scale dependence in the growth of matter fluctuations and in halo bias, which can be exploited to test the dynamical nature of dark energy at the level of its fluctuations. For cluster-sized halos, the amplitude of the scale-dependent halo bias is comparable to that produced by massless neutrinos in $Λ$CDM. Using a Fisher forecast for a multi-tracer analysis of the power spectrum (P) and bispectrum (B) of galaxy number counts, we find that bispectrum information is essential to detect the scale dependence induced by the DDE sound mode. For a survey of volume $V\sim 10\, h^{-3}{\rm Gpc}^3$ at redshift $z=0.5 - 1$, a two-tracer P+B analysis could detect this scale dependence if the sound speeds of the dark energy fluids are in the range $c_s^2\sim 10^{-2} - 10^{-4}$. Lower sound speeds cause halos to experience a gravitational drag force through the excitations of sound waves. This effect impacts measurements of the growth rate inferred from cluster-sized halos at the 10\% level if one of the fluids has a very low sound speed $c_s^2\sim 10^{-5}$. Larger sound speeds $c_s^2 > 10^{-2}$ could be probed with optimal weighting schemes that reduce shot noise and increase the effective bias.

AI.tldr: 通过双流体模型研究发现，动力学暗能量（DDE）产生的声波扰动会导致物质涨落和晕偏置（halo bias）的尺度依赖性，利用星系数密度功率谱（P）和双谱（B）的多示踪分析可探测该效应，其中双谱信息对探测DDE声速模式（sound mode）的尺度依赖性至关重要。
AI.background: 研究探索了动力学暗能量（DDE）对宇宙结构增长的扰动效应及其在星系巡天中的可观测特征。
AI.data: 数据来源于对星系数统计的功率谱（P）和双谱（B）进行多示踪分析（multi-tracer analysis）的费希尔预测（Fisher forecast），针对红移范围$z=0.5 - 1$、体积$V\sim 10\, h^{-3}{\rm Gpc}^3$的巡天观测。
AI.method: 采用双流体模型（two-fluid model）研究动力学暗能量（DDE）对宇宙结构增长的影响，通过允许暗能量状态方程平滑穿越幻影界限（phantom divide）并支持类似声波的传播扰动。
AI.result: 动态暗能量（DDE）的声波扰动会诱导物质涨落和晕偏置（halo bias）的尺度依赖性，可用于通过其涨落测试暗能量的动力学性质。

title: SNAPPY CubeSat Control Script Generation and Data File Processing
comment: Page Count: 11, Figure Count: 6, Table Count: 3; This is a pre-print article intended to be submitted for Nuclear Instruments and Methods A
summary: This is a document discussing the creation and usage of a server system dedicated to retrieving, processing, and storing data generated from the Solar Neutrino and Astro-Particle PhYsics (SNAPPY) CubeSat by the nuSOL (Neutrino Solar Orbiting Laboratory) Project. On a traditional desktop computer with CERN's ROOT and PostgreSQL software installed, and with a file system on two mirrored drives, it is possible to automatically process and organize incoming data, along with keeping a database to record each incoming file along with a command record. In addition to this, an application was created to provide a Graphical User Interface to assist with creating commands to communicate with the CubeSat. With that said, there are still plenty of plans to improve the software, mainly providing an automatic emailing system to notify team members when they are not around the server.

AI.tldr: 开发了用于nuSOL项目中SNAPPY立方星数据自动检索、处理和存储的服务器系统，包含基于ROOT和PostgreSQL的数据处理架构及卫星指令图形界面(GUI)，并计划增加自动邮件通知功能。
AI.background: 研究背景聚焦于开发专用服务器系统以支持nuSOL（Neutrino Solar Orbiting Laboratory）项目中SNAPPY（Solar Neutrino and Astro-Particle PhYsics）立方星（CubeSat）生成数据的检索、处理和存储。
AI.data: 数据来源于太阳中微子和天体粒子物理立方星（SNAPPY）通过中微子太阳轨道实验室（nuSOL）项目生成的观测数据。
AI.method: 采用CERN的ROOT软件和PostgreSQL数据库构建数据处理系统，并开发图形用户界面(GUI)辅助生成与立方星(CubeSat)通信的指令。
AI.result: 开发了一个服务器系统，用于自动处理、存储来自SNAPPY CubeSat（太阳中微子与天体粒子物理立方星）的数据，并记录文件及指令到PostgreSQL数据库，同时提供了图形用户界面(GUI)辅助生成卫星指令。

title: MXDFz4.4: A LyC emitter 250Myr after the epoch of reionization and a first test of Ly-alpha morphology as a tracer of LyC escape at high redshift
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures, 2 tables, 2 appendices. Submitted to ApJ
summary: Assessing the contribution of ionizing sources to cosmic reionization is a central goal of extragalactic astrophysics. Understanding and quantifying ionizing escape remains challenging near the epoch of reionization. We present the highest-redshift Lyman continuum (LyC) emitter detected to date, MXDFz4.4 at z=4.442 in the MUSE eXtremely Deep Field, observed only ~0.25Gyr after the end of reionization. A high confidence Ly-alpha line confirms the redshift. LyC flux is detected at 10.3sigma in the F435W filter with a flux of 4.2+/-0.5nJy, corresponding to a flux measurement at 8.0sigma. After correcting for the intrinsic production of LyC photons and the IGM opacity at z=4.44, we derive high escape fractions, ranging from 50 - 100%. We apply established low-redshift tracers of LyC escape and, for the first time at high redshift, promising Ly-alpha morphological tracers such as the halo fraction. SED fitting indicates the presence of a recent burst of star formation; we explore its impact on the production and escape of ionizing photons. Ly-alpha-based tracers of LyC escape reveal a complex scenario in which the recent burst strong influences LyC production and escape, combined with a more evolved stellar population. This interpretation is supported by UV diagnostics, including the star formation rate surface density and sSFR. Our results provide cautious support for the Ly-alpha halo fraction as a LyC escape tracer at high redshift. Considering the burst-driven enhancement in LyC production and escape, we conclude that stochastic star formation in the early Universe likely plays a significant role in the contribution of galaxies to cosmic reionization.

AI.tldr: 发现了红移(z)4.442的莱曼连续谱(LyC)发射体MXDFz4.4，其光子逃逸率高达50-100%，表明早期宇宙中星暴活动对宇宙再电离的重要贡献。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于宇宙再电离（cosmic reionization）过程中电离源（ionizing sources）的贡献评估，特别是高红移（high-redshift）星系中电离光子逃逸（LyC escape）的量化挑战。
AI.data: 数据来源于MUSE eXtremely Deep Field（MXDF）中红移z=4.442的LyC（Lyman continuum）发射体MXDFz4.4的观测，使用F435W滤光片检测到10.3σ显著性的LyC流量（4.2±0.5nJy）。
AI.method: 采用已确立的低红移莱曼连续谱(LyC)逃逸示踪方法和首次应用于高红移的莱曼阿尔法(Ly-alpha)形态示踪指标（如光晕占比(halo fraction)），结合光谱能量分布(SED)拟合和紫外(UV)诊断（包括恒星形成率面密度和比恒星形成率(sSFR)）分析。
AI.result: 在z=4.442处发现的MXDFz4.4是目前最高红移的莱曼连续谱(LyC)发射体，其LyC逃逸分数高达50-100%，表明早期宇宙中星系的随机恒星形成对宇宙再电离有重要贡献。

title: Reassessing the SIGW Interpretation of PTA Signal: The Role of Third-Order Gravitational Waves and Implications for the PBH Overproduction
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures
summary: In light of recent interpretations attributing pulsar timing array (PTA) signal to second-order gravitational waves induced by linear cosmological curvature perturbations in the early universe, the overproduction of primordial black holes (PBHs) poses a theoretical tension. In this work, we address this issue through extending such a scalar-induced gravitational wave (SIGW) framework to include third-order gravitational waves, which allow for a substantial enhancement in the spectral amplitude of SIGWs. Analyzing a combined dataset from cosmic microwave background and baryon acoustic oscillations, we derive cosmological constraints on the physical energy-density fraction of cosmological gravitational waves. Further incorporating PTA data, we obtain constraints on the spectral amplitude and peak frequency of SIGWs. Our results indicate that the parameter region favored by the data combination can to some extent alleviate the PBH overproduction problem, thereby supporting the theoretical consistency of our model. Furthermore, we demonstrate the robustness of our SIGW interpretation for the PTA signal by extending the analysis to include a gravitational wave background from supermassive black hole binaries. These findings are poised for further scrutiny with future high-precision observations.

AI.tldr: 通过引入三阶引力波增强标量诱导引力波（SIGW）谱振幅，结合多源观测数据约束其参数，缓解了原初黑洞（PBH）过量产生问题，并验证了SIGW对脉冲星计时阵（PTA）信号解释的鲁棒性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于脉冲星计时阵（PTA）信号与早期宇宙线性曲率扰动诱导的二阶引力波关联性引发的原初黑洞（PBH）过量产生问题，探索高阶引力波对缓解该理论矛盾的潜在贡献。
AI.data: 数据来源包括宇宙微波背景（cosmic microwave background）和重子声学振荡（baryon acoustic oscillations）的联合数据集，以及脉冲星计时阵列（pulsar timing array）数据。
AI.method: 将标量诱导引力波（SIGW）框架扩展至三阶引力波以增强其频谱振幅，并结合宇宙微波背景和重子声学振荡数据推导宇宙学约束。
AI.result: 将标量诱导引力波（SIGW）框架扩展至三阶引力波可显著增强其频谱振幅，从而部分缓解原初黑洞（PBH）过量产生问题。

title: A Fast Generative Framework for High-dimensional Posterior Sampling: Application to CMB Delensing
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures. ML4Astro 2025 workshop paper on fast generative posterior sampling with application to CMB delensing
summary: We introduce a deep generative framework for high-dimensional Bayesian inference that enables efficient posterior sampling. As telescopes and simulations rapidly expand the volume and resolution of astrophysical data, fast simulation-based inference methods are increasingly needed to extract scientific insights. While diffusion-based approaches offer high-quality generative capabilities, they are hindered by slow sampling speeds. Our method performs posterior sampling an order of magnitude faster than a diffusion baseline. Applied to the problem of CMB delensing, it successfully recovers the unlensed CMB power spectrum from simulated observations. The model also remains robust to shifts in cosmological parameters, demonstrating its potential for out-of-distribution generalization and application to observational cosmological data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于高维贝叶斯推断的深度生成框架，在宇宙微波背景（CMB）去透镜（delensing）任务中比扩散基线方法快一个数量级地恢复真实功率谱，并展现出对宇宙学参数变化的鲁棒性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用深度生成框架解决高维贝叶斯推断问题，以应对天体物理数据规模和分辨率快速增长带来的高效后验采样需求。
AI.data: 数据来源于模拟观测（simulated observations）生成的宇宙微波背景（CMB）透镜化及去透镜化功率谱。
AI.method: 采用基于深度生成框架的高维贝叶斯推断方法，结合快速模拟推断技术实现高效后验采样。
AI.result: 提出了一种用于高维贝叶斯推断的深度生成框架，能够实现高效的后验采样（posterior sampling），其采样速度比扩散基线（diffusion baseline）快一个数量级。

title: Detection of non-thermal radio emission components from the Orion Nebula: stellar jets, cloud collision or feedback from stellar winds?
comment: 18 pages, 19 figures, 3 tables. Accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: The Orion Nebula is the closest high-mass star-forming region, making it an ideal laboratory to investigate physical processes in complex star-forming environments. At radio frequencies, the dominant emission mechanisms are thermal bremsstrahlung and non-thermal synchrotron. HII regions typically emit thermal radiation tracing the ionised gas; however, detecting and characterising non-thermal emission can provide insights into magnetic fields and the energy distribution of relativistic particles in star-forming regions. We have utilised the upgraded Giant Metrewave Radio Telescope (uGMRT) to study radio emission in the Extended Orion Nebula (EON) region. We present results from wide-band interferometric observations using uGMRT bands 3 and 4, probing a frequency range not covered by other sensitive radio interferometers. We produced deep continuum images with RMS noise levels of $\sim400\,μ$Jy~beam$^{-1}$ in band 3 and $\sim200\,μ$Jy~beam$^{-1}$ in band 4. We further generated in-band and broad-band spectral index maps using these images. To establish the robustness of the spectral index measurements, we conducted a detailed analysis using simulated uGMRT data. From the continuum spectral index analysis, we report the unambiguous presence of non-thermal radio emission in the EON region. To investigate its plausible origin, we correlated our results with multiwavelength observations, identifying a strong association between non-thermal emission and outflows from young stellar objects, while also exploring alternative explanations. In future, reliable broad-band radio spectral index measurements, together with dedicated multiwavelength observations, will be invaluable for resolving the origin of non-thermal emission in the Orion Nebula and other star-forming regions.

AI.tldr: 利用升级的巨米波射电望远镜(uGMRT)首次在扩展猎户座星云(EON)区域明确探测到非热辐射，发现其与年轻恒星天体喷流存在强相关性。
AI.background: 研究猎户座星云(Orion Nebula)这一邻近的高质量恒星形成区，旨在揭示复杂恒星形成环境中的物理过程（特别是热轫致辐射(thermal bremsstrahlung)和非热同步辐射(non-thermal synchrotron)的发射机制）及其与磁场、相对论粒子能量分布的关联。
AI.data: 使用升级后的巨型米波射电望远镜（uGMRT）的3和4波段进行宽频带干涉观测，覆盖了其他灵敏射电干涉仪未探测的频率范围。
AI.method: 采用升级后的巨米波射电望远镜(uGMRT)进行宽频带干涉观测，并利用模拟数据验证谱指数测量的可靠性。
AI.result: 在扩展猎户座星云(EON)区域首次明确探测到非热辐射(non-thermal emission)，其起源与年轻恒星天体(YSO)的外流存在强相关性。

title: The Bayesian view of DESI DR2: Evidence and tension in a combined analysis with CMB and supernovae across cosmological models
comment: 30 pages, 15 figures
summary: We apply the unimpeded framework to perform a fully Bayesian reanalysis of the DESI DR2 data, using nested sampling with PolyChord to compute evidences for $Λ$CDM and seven extensions across combinations of DESI DR1/DR2, Planck CMB, supernovae (Pantheon+, Union3, DES-SN5YR, DES-Dovekie), and DES-Y1 weak lensing. The Bayesian Ockham's razor penalises extended models, yielding weaker or opposite preferences compared to $Δχ^2$-based analyses. For DESI DR2 BAO combined with Planck CMB alone, the DESI collaboration's $3.1σ$ frequentist preference for $w_0w_a$CDM is eliminated entirely: we obtain ${\ln B = -0.57{\scriptstyle\pm0.26}}$, modestly favouring $Λ$CDM. Adding the corrected DES-Dovekie supernova calibration maintains this concordance (${\ln B = -0.01{\scriptstyle\pm0.27}}$). However, when the original DES-SN5YR calibration is included instead, the DESI collaboration's $4.2σ$ result survives the Bayesian Ockham penalty as a $3.07{\scriptstyle\pm0.10}\,σ$ preference (${\ln B = +3.32{\scriptstyle\pm0.27}}$). That this signal persists despite the Ockham penalty makes the role of tension quantification essential: our analysis traced the preference to the DES-SN5YR calibration error, which introduced a $2.95{\scriptstyle\pm 0.04}\,σ$ conflict with DESI DR2 within $Λ$CDM -- a tension that stands out from the grid -- reduced to $1.96{\scriptstyle\pm 0.04}\,σ$ once the calibration was corrected. With the calibration corrected, the Bayesian evidence for dynamical dark energy vanishes.

AI.tldr: 采用贝叶斯重分析（Bayesian reanalysis）结合DESI DR2重子声波振荡（BAO）、普朗克宇宙微波背景（Planck CMB）及超新星数据，发现原DES-SN5YR校准误差导致ΛCDM与$w_0w_a$CDM间3.1σ差异，修正后动态暗能量（dynamical dark energy）证据消失。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用贝叶斯方法重新分析DESI DR2数据，评估ΛCDM（Lambda Cold Dark Matter）模型及其扩展版本在多种宇宙学数据集（包括重子声波振荡、宇宙微波背景、超新星和弱引力透镜）中的证据强度。
AI.data: 数据来源包括DESI DR1/DR2、Planck CMB、超新星数据（Pantheon+、Union3、DES-SN5YR、DES-Dovekie）以及DES-Y1弱引力透镜观测。
AI.method: 采用无阻碍框架(unimpeded framework)结合嵌套抽样(nested sampling)和PolyChord算法进行完全贝叶斯分析，计算ΛCDM及其七个扩展模型的证据值(evidence)。
AI.result: 贝叶斯奥卡姆剃刀（Bayesian Ockham's razor）对扩展模型施加惩罚，导致与基于Δχ²的分析相比偏好减弱或相反。

title: NEXUS: Quick Release Notes
comment: This is an arXiv-only document that describes the quick data releases from the NEXUS-JWST program through 2028. This document will be updated regularly to follow the cadenced observations from NEXUS (with a delay of ~2 months after each epoch). Data products are available at https://ariel.astro.illinois.edu/nexus/qdr/. Please send comments and suggestions to M. Zhuang and Y. Shen
summary: NEXUS is a JWST Multi-Cycle (Cycles 3-5) GO Treasury imaging and spectroscopic survey around the North Ecliptic Pole during 2024-2028. It contains two overlapping tiers in depth and area coverage. The Wide tier ($\sim 400~{\rm arcmin}^2$) performs NIRCam/WFSS 2.4-5 $μ$m grism spectroscopy with three annual epochs over 3 years (final spectral continuum ${\rm S/N/pixel>3}$ at F444W $<22.2$), accompanied by NIRCam multi-band imaging in F090W, F115W, F150W, F200W, F356W and F444W. The Deep tier ($\sim 50~{\rm arcmin}^2$) performs high-multiplexing NIRSpec 0.54-5.5 $μ$m MOS/PRISM spectroscopy for ~10,000 targets in total, over 18 epochs with a 2-month cadence, along with F200W+F444W NIRCam imaging for each epoch. Parallel imaging observations with MIRI and additional NIRCam filters are also performed within the Wide and Deep tiers. The primary data covering the Deep tier (including NIRCam imaging, NIRSpec/MSA spectra, and vetted MSA spectroscopic redshifts) are released in regular Quick Data Releases to facilitate follow-up studies. This evolving document describes the MSA targeting information and observing status for each of the 18 Deep epochs, which started in May 2025 and continue on the regular 2-month cadence. We also describe the content and caveats of the quick release data and report selected cases of diverse scientific interests.

AI.tldr: NEXUS巡天计划利用JWST在2024-2028年对北黄极(North Ecliptic Pole)区域开展多波段成像和光谱观测，通过宽区(Wide tier)和深区(Deep tier)两档覆盖，实现了NIRCam/WFSS 2.4-5μm光谱与多波段成像的宽视场监测，以及NIRSpec 0.54-5.5μm高复用度MOS/PRISM光谱对~10,000个目标的深度时域观测，并定期发布深区数据以支持后续研究。
AI.background: 该研究围绕詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）在2024-2028年期间对北黄极（North Ecliptic Pole）区域开展的多周期（Cycles 3-5）深度成像与光谱巡天（NEXUS），旨在通过宽视场（Wide tier）与深场（Deep tier）两层次观测获取近红外至中红外波段的星系演化、恒星形成及宇宙学参数的高精度数据。
AI.data: 数据来源于JWST（James Webb Space Telescope）在2024-2028年期间对北黄极区域进行的NIRCam/WFSS（2.4-5μm）和NIRSpec（0.54-5.5μm）多波段成像与光谱观测，包括宽视场（Wide tier）的3年3次重复观测和深视场（Deep tier）的18次2个月间隔重复观测，并辅以MIRI并行成像和额外NIRCam滤光片观测。
AI.method: 采用近红外相机（NIRCam）宽场狭缝光谱（WFSS）和多目标光谱仪（NIRSpec）多天体狭缝（MOS）棱镜（PRISM）技术进行2.4-5微米和0.54-5.5微米光谱观测，结合多波段成像（F090W至F444W）和中红外仪器（MIRI）并行观测。
AI.result: NEXUS计划在2024-2028年期间利用JWST进行北黄极区域的多波段成像和光谱观测，包含宽视场（Wide）和深视场（Deep）两个重叠层级的观测。

title: Aromatic Species in the Molecular Universe
comment: Earth and Space Chemistry (2026)
summary:
Interstellar polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbon (PAHs) are an important component of the interstellar medium of galaxies, containing some 10 percent of the elemental carbon. Their vibrational emission dominates the mid-infrared spectra of galactic and extragalactic objects. PAHs control the heating of interstellar neutral gas and the charge balance of molecular clouds. PAHs are formed in the outflows from late type stars through chemical processes akin to those in sooting flames and then further processed in the interstellar medium by UV photolysis and strong shock waves. PAHs are also formed through ion molecule reactions and neutral radical reactions in dense cloud cores.
  The James Webb Space Telescope has provided a wealth of high-quality spectra that have provided new insights in the characteristics of the interstellar PAH family. Their analysis is supported by dedicated laboratory and quantum chemistry studies, feeding into detailed molecular physics models relevant to astronomical environments. Laboratory studies have also provided deeper insight in the chemical evolution of PAHs in the interstellar medium. This paper will review progress in the field and chart its future.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文的核心贡献是综述了星际多环芳烃（PAHs）的形成、演化及其在星系星际介质（ISM）中的关键作用，并总结了詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）观测与实验室研究对该领域的新见解。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于星际多环芳烃（PAHs）在星系星际介质中的关键作用及其形成与演化机制。
AI.data: 数据来源为詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（James Webb Space Telescope）提供的高质量光谱数据，并结合了实验室研究和量子化学研究的支持数据。
AI.method: 采用实验室研究、量子化学计算和分子物理模型（molecular physics models）分析星际多环芳烃（PAHs）的化学演化及光谱特性。
AI.result: 星际多环芳烃（PAHs）是星系星际介质的重要组成部分，约占据元素碳的10%，其振动辐射主导了银河系和河外星系天体的中红外光谱。

title: PulSKASim: A Pulsar Simulator for SKA-Scale Interferometric Observations
comment: Accepted by Astronomical Data Analysis Software and Systems (ADASS) XXXV 2025
summary: Accurate simulation of pulsar flux variability is critical for testing Square Kilometre Array (SKA) interferometric pipelines. However, most existing simulators neglect the effects of integration time and related observational parameters, limiting their realism and utility for interferometric end-to-end testing. To address these shortcomings, we develop a Pulsar Simulator for SKA-scale interferometric observations (PulSKASim), which models pulsar flux evolution across pulsar period, maximum flux, duty cycle, and noise, accounting for integration time, sampling, and observation duration, and naturally models flux smoothing that arises from finite integration within each dump time. PulSKASim generates synthetic measurement sets using functions in simulators for radio interferometers, such as OSKAR and Pyuvsim, where each snapshot contains pulsars with controlled flux levels, enabling realistic per-time-slot experiments. This simulator allows for detailed assessment of calibration, imaging, and detection pipelines under realistic SKA-like conditions, bridging pulsar variability modelling with interferometric simulation in a way not achievable by existing tools.

AI.tldr: 开发了PulSKASim模拟器，通过精确建模脉冲星（pulsar）流量随周期、最大流量、占空比和噪声的演化，并考虑积分时间、采样和观测时长等参数，填补了现有工具在平方公里阵列（SKA）干涉测量端到端测试中脉冲星流量变异性模拟的空白。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于提升平方公里阵列（SKA）干涉测量流程测试的准确性，通过开发新型脉冲星流量模拟器（PulSKASim）解决现有工具忽略积分时间等关键观测参数导致的模拟局限性。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源为通过OSKAR和Pyuvsim等射电干涉仪模拟器生成的合成测量集（synthetic measurement sets），其中每个快照（snapshot）包含具有可控流量水平的脉冲星。
AI.method: 开发了PulSKASim模拟器，通过建模脉冲星周期、最大流量、占空比和噪声等参数，并考虑积分时间、采样和观测时长，生成合成测量集（measurement sets），以模拟SKA规模干涉观测中的脉冲星流量变化。
AI.result: 开发了PulSKASim模拟器，可精确模拟脉冲星（pulsar）在积分时间、采样和观测时长影响下的流量演化，填补了现有工具无法结合脉冲星变异性建模与干涉测量模拟的空白。

title: The First Detection of Forbidden Emission Lines at the Outskirts of the AGN Broad Line Region?
summary: Double-peaked (DP) broad emission line profiles in active galactic nuclei (AGNs) are often interpreted as signatures of rotating disk-like structures in the broad-line region (BLR) and are commonly observed in low-luminosity AGNs using recombination lines. We use optical spectroscopy to investigate the origin of double-peaked broad emission line profiles observed not only in hydrogen recombination lines but also in forbidden transitions in the LINER galaxy IC 1459. We detected DP emission in all strong optical lines except for the [S II] doublet, which has the lowest critical density among all the lines. We successfully fitted the DP broad profiles using a disk-like BLR model, assuming a circular accretion disk with an inclination of approximately 35 degrees and internal turbulence of about 500 km/s, confined within a maximum radius of 9.6 (+4.8, -1.1) light-years. We estimate a full width at half maximum of the DP profiles of about 3300 km/s. Our results provide new insights into the structure of the BLR, indicating that forbidden emission lines can be produced in lower-density regions near the outskirts of the BLR.

AI.tldr: 研究发现LINER星系IC 1459中氢复合线和禁戒跃迁均呈现双峰(Double-peaked)宽发射线轮廓，通过盘状宽线区(BLR)模型拟合表明其结构为倾角约35度、内部湍流速度约500 km/s、最大半径9.6 (+4.8, -1.1)光年的圆形吸积盘，证实禁戒发射线可在BLR外围低密度区产生。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于活动星系核（AGN）中双峰（DP）宽发射线轮廓的起源及其对宽线区（BLR）盘状结构的指示作用，特别关注低光度AGN中重组线和禁戒线的观测现象。
AI.data: 数据来源于对LINER星系IC 1459的光谱观测（optical spectroscopy），包括氢复合线和禁戒跃迁线的双峰宽发射线轮廓（double-peaked broad emission line profiles），但排除了临界密度最低的[S II]双线。
AI.method: 采用圆盘状宽线区（BLR）模型拟合双峰发射线轮廓，假设吸积盘倾角约35度、内部湍流速度约500 km/s，最大半径限制在9.6 (+4.8, -1.1) 光年范围内。
AI.result: 在LINER星系IC 1459中，除[S II]双线外所有强光学发射线均检测到双峰（DP）轮廓，表明禁戒发射线可在宽线区（BLR）外围低密度区域产生。

title: AstroInspect: a web-based system to organize, assess, and visually inspect astronomical objects
comment: 20 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, accepted in AJ
summary: The rapid growth of imaging and spectroscopic surveys has intensified the need for efficient tools that support visual inspection, a practice that remains essential for tasks such as classification, catalog refinement, and validation of automated methods. Existing solutions, however, often require the use of multiple platforms and complex workflows to integrate heterogeneous data. To address this challenge, we present the first release of the AstroInspect (https://astroinspect.github.io), a web-based system which ensures seamless access to several astronomical resources. The system provides an intuitive graphical user interface (GUI) through which users can upload catalogs of objects defined by celestial coordinates. AstroInspect automatically enriches these catalogs with complementary information, including imaging, spectroscopic, and photometric data retrieved in real time from surveys such as the Sloan Digital Sky Survey (SDSS), the Legacy Surveys (LS), and the Southern Photometric Local Universe Survey (S-PLUS). As an example of its scientific utility, we used AstroInspect to identify H$α$ emission-line galaxies within a 7 deg radius in the direction of the Hydra I cluster (also known as Abell 1060) by visual inspection. Using a candidate set of 981 galaxies selected from S-PLUS photometric data, we produced a catalog of 80 galaxies with confirmed H$α$ emission. These results highlight the potential of AstroInspect to support efficient visual inspection workflows.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于网页的天文数据可视化工具AstroInspect，通过整合SDSS、LS和S-PLUS等多源观测数据实现了实时交互式天体目标分类与验证，并以长蛇座I星系团方向981个候选体中确认80个Hα发射星系为例验证了其科学价值。
AI.background: 天文观测数据快速增长背景下亟需高效工具支持视觉检查（visual inspection）以完成分类、星表优化和自动化方法验证等任务。
AI.data: 数据来源包括斯隆数字巡天(SDSS)、遗产巡天(LS)和南天局域宇宙测光巡天(S-PLUS)的实时获取的成像、光谱和测光数据。
AI.method: 基于网络平台的AstroInspect系统，通过整合斯隆数字巡天(SDSS)、Legacy Surveys(LS)和南天光度局部宇宙巡天(S-PLUS)等多源数据，提供实时图像、光谱和测光数据的自动化检索与图形用户界面(GUI)交互式可视化分析。
AI.result: 开发了基于网页的天文数据可视化工具AstroInspect，可实时整合多源观测数据并辅助高效目视检查。

title: 3D Rotation of the Open Cluster NGC 2516
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, submitted to MNRAS
summary: We have combined Gaia astrometry with Gaia-ESO Survey radial velocities to measure the 3D rotation of the open cluster NGC 2516. We compiled a sample of 430 members with astrometry and spectroscopy and use these to determine a distance to the cluster of 406.3 +/- 0.8 pc, which we then use to infer the 3D positions and velocities of all stars in the cluster using a Bayesian model. We identify the axis of maximum cluster rotation and measure a median rotational velocity of 0.12 +/- 0.02 km/s. We find the axis of maximum cluster rotation to be 74 +/- 17 degrees to the plane of our galaxy. We compare this rotation rate to measurements of cluster rotation in other open clusters and find that it is inconsistent with the expected dependences on cluster age and mass.

AI.tldr: 结合盖亚(Gaia)天体测量和盖亚-ESO巡天径向速度数据，首次精确测量了疏散星团NGC 2516的三维旋转（中值转速0.12±0.02 km/s），发现其最大旋转轴与银河系平面夹角为74±17度，且转速与星团年龄和质量的理论预期不符。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用盖亚(Gaia)天体测量和盖亚-ESO巡天径向速度数据测量疏散星团NGC 2516的三维旋转特性，并探讨其旋转轴与银河系盘面的夹角及旋转速度与星团年龄、质量预期关系的偏差。
AI.data: 数据来源为盖亚(Gaia)天体测量数据和盖亚-ESO巡天(Gaia-ESO Survey)的径向速度数据。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯模型(Bayesian model)结合盖亚(Gaia)天体测量和盖亚-ESO巡天径向速度数据，推断疏散星团NGC 2516中所有恒星的三维位置和速度。
AI.result: 测得的NGC 2516星团中位旋转速度为0.12±0.02 km/s，其最大旋转轴与银河系平面夹角为74±17度，且该旋转速率与星团年龄和质量预期关系不符。

title: A New Method for Identifying Contaminating Sources and Locating Target Sources through the Cross-Arm Features of Micro Pore Optics
summary: The Pathfinder of the Type-A satellites in the Chasing All Transients Constellation Hunters (CATCH) space mission is equipped with Micro-Pore Optics (MPOs) and four single-pixel Silicon Drift Detectors (SDDs). Due to the lack of position resolution in an individual SDD, we propose a new method based on the cross-arms in the point spread function (PSF) of MPOs to enhance the satellite's capability in identifying contaminating sources and locating target sources. By placing one detector on each of the horizontal and vertical cross-arms on the focal plane, we can use the changes in the relative counts on the cross-arms detectors to deduce the location of the source. Simulated observations demonstrate that, for a target source with a flux of 1 Crab and an exposure time of 200 s, the cross-arms detectors can identify contaminating source with the same flux level at an off-axis angle larger than 8', and improve positioning accuracy to 6'. Furthermore, we extend the simulation study to CATCH Type-A, which plans to use an SDD array. In situations where sources exhibit the same flux of 1 Crab and the exposure time is merely 1 s, a 16x16 SDD array is capable of identifying contaminating source with an off-axis angle greater than 2.4' and can achieve a positioning precision of 1.8'.

AI.tldr: 提出利用微孔光学器件（MPOs）点扩散函数（PSF）十字臂结构增强卫星识别污染源和定位目标源能力的新方法，通过十字臂探测器相对计数变化推导源位置，模拟显示在1 Crab流量和200秒曝光下可识别8'离轴角污染源并实现6'定位精度，扩展至16x16硅漂移探测器（SDDs）阵列时1秒曝光下识别离轴角2.4'污染源且定位精度达1.8'。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于提升CATCH（Chasing All Transients Constellation Hunters）空间任务中Type-A卫星搭载的微孔光学元件（Micro-Pore Optics, MPOs）和硅漂移探测器（Silicon Drift Detectors, SDDs）对污染源的识别能力及目标源定位精度。
AI.data: 数据来源于模拟观测（simulation），包括使用微孔光学（MPOs）和硅漂移探测器（SDDs）的仿真实验，以及针对CATCH Type-A卫星计划中SDD阵列的扩展模拟研究。
AI.method: 采用基于微孔光学器件（MPOs）点扩散函数（PSF）十字臂的新型定位方法，通过水平与垂直十字臂上的探测器相对计数变化反演目标源位置。
AI.result: 提出了一种基于微孔光学器件（MPO）点扩散函数（PSF）十字臂的新方法，通过水平与垂直十字臂探测器相对计数变化定位目标源，模拟显示在1 Crab流量和200秒曝光下可识别8'离轴角污染源并将定位精度提升至6'。

title: Early Planet Formation in Embedded Disks (eDisk). XVIII. Indication of a possible spiral structure in the dust-continuum emission of the protostellar disk around IRAS 16544-1604 in CB 68
comment: 16 pages, 16 figures
summary: We performed numerical simulations along with radiative transfer calculations to reproduce an intriguing asymmetric shoulder feature in the dust-continuum emission of the protostellar disk around one of the eDisk targets, the Class 0 protostar IRAS 16544-1604 in CB 68. This is our first attempt to bridge the theoretical works of protostellar disk evolution and the eDisk observations. We found that while our hydrodynamic simulations form spiral structures caused by gravitational instability, they become less discernible after the disk is inclined and convolved with the telescope beam. The widths of the spiral structure as obtained by our numerical simulations are ~0.1-0.8 times the eDisk beam size of 4.5 au. Our modeling effor implies that the apparent absence of spiral features in the eDisk observations does not necessarily indicate the real absence of internal substructures and gravitational instability. We also found that the asymmetric shoulder structure of the continuum profile along the major axis appears when the disk is massive enough with a Toomre parameter Q~1. This mechanism offers a potential explanation for the observed, asymmetric shoulder features in the disks surrounding IRAS 16544-1604 and the other eDisk sources.

AI.tldr: 通过数值模拟和辐射传输计算发现，原恒星盘（protostellar disk）IRAS 16544-1604尘埃连续谱发射中的不对称肩部特征可由托尔敏参数（Toomre parameter）Q~1的盘内引力不稳定性（gravitational instability）解释，且观测中螺旋结构不明显并不代表内部子结构缺失。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于原恒星盘（protostellar disk）演化理论与eDisk观测之间的关联，探讨引力不稳定性（gravitational instability）在盘结构形成中的作用及其观测表现。
AI.data: 研究采用数值模拟（numerical simulation）结合辐射传输计算（radiative transfer calculation）的数据来源。
AI.method: 采用流体动力学模拟（hydrodynamic simulations）结合辐射传输计算（radiative transfer calculations）分析原行星盘（protostellar disk）的引力不稳定性（gravitational instability）和螺旋结构（spiral structures）。
AI.result: 数值模拟和辐射传输计算表明，原行星盘（protostellar disk）中观测到的不对称肩部特征（asymmetric shoulder feature）可能源于质量足够大（托尔米参数Q~1）时产生的螺旋结构，即使这些结构因盘面倾斜和望远镜波束卷积而变得难以分辨。

title: MWA tied-array processing V: Super-resolved localisation via amplitude-only maximum likelihood direction finding
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Accepted for publication in PASA
summary: Interferometric localisation of transients and pulsars via tied-array beam processing is challenging and can be limited by the native spatial resolution achievable by the instrument, especially at low frequencies and for compact interferometers. Knowledge of the telescope primary and tied-array beam patterns allows the exploitation of the beam structures and the relationship to measured quantities, such as signal-to-noise ratio, through radio direction finding techniques. The additional information provides a "super-resolved" localisation (i.e., where the precision is much better than the native spatial resolution) of a source when there are multiple detections in adjacent tied-array beams. We demonstrate this approach using the Murchison Widefield Array (MWA) and its voltage capture and tied-array processing capabilities, with a specific focus on how it benefits the on-going Southern-sky MWA Rapid Two-metre pulsar survey as it starts producing more candidates requiring follow-up. Examples of localisations with previously discovered MWA pulsars which were subsequently localised via imaging with higher spatial resolution interferometers are used to validate the process, along with localisations of a sample of known pulsars to demonstrate the robustness of the method and its uncertainty estimation.

AI.tldr: 通过利用望远镜主波束和绑定波束（tied-array beam）模式信息结合无线电测向技术，在默奇森宽场阵列（MWA）上实现了超越原生空间分辨率的瞬变源和脉冲星"超分辨"定位（super-resolved localisation），验证了该方法对南天快速两米脉冲星巡天（Southern-sky MWA Rapid Two-metre pulsar survey）候选体后续跟踪定位的有效性和不确定性评估的可靠性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用干涉仪（interferometer）和波束成形（tied-array beam）技术提升低频紧凑阵列对瞬变源和脉冲星（pulsar）的超分辨率定位（super-resolved localisation）能力。
AI.data: 数据来源于默奇森宽场阵列（MWA）的电压捕获和绑定阵列（tied-array）处理能力，并利用先前发现的MWA脉冲星通过高分辨率干涉成像定位的案例以及已知脉冲星样本的定位进行验证。
AI.method: 采用射电定向（radio direction finding）技术结合MWA（Murchison Widefield Array）的电压捕获和固定阵列（tied-array）处理能力，通过多相邻波束信号的信噪比与波束结构关系实现超分辨（super-resolved）定位。
AI.result: 利用望远镜主波束和固定阵列波束模式，通过无线电测向技术结合多波束探测实现瞬变体和脉冲星（pulsar）的超分辨率定位（super-resolved localisation），其精度远超仪器固有空间分辨率。

title: Accelerating massive galaxy formation with primordial black hole seed nuclei
comment: to appear in AJ
summary: If massive primordial black holes (PBHs) exist and constitute a fraction of the dark matter, they can dramatically catalyze galaxy formation. By acting as pre-existing, high-density seeds, they can shorten the galaxy assembly time to as little as 100 Myr for up to 10^8 solar mass PBH seeds, allowing for the rapid formation of host halos. Furthermore, low surface brightness or diffuse galaxies may represent a natural outcome of this process, perhaps as the residue of halos seeded by smaller PBHs that failed to accrete a major baryonic component.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，大质量原初黑洞（PBHs）作为暗物质组分可通过充当高密度种子将星系形成时间缩短至100 Myr，并可能导致低表面亮度或弥散星系的形成。
AI.background: 该研究探讨了原始黑洞（PBHs）作为暗物质候选者通过其高密度种子效应加速星系形成（galaxy formation）的潜在机制及其对低表面亮度星系（low surface brightness galaxies）起源的影响。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源为理论模拟（simulation）数据，基于假设的原初黑洞（PBHs）作为暗物质（dark matter）组分对星系形成的影响进行建模。
AI.method: 采用数值模拟（numerical simulation）和半解析模型（semi-analytic model）分析原始黑洞（PBHs）作为暗物质（dark matter）种子对星系形成的催化作用。
AI.result: 大质量原初黑洞（PBHs）作为暗物质组分可显著加速星系形成，将星系组装时间缩短至100 Myr以内，并可能导致低表面亮度或弥散星系的产生。

title: The Age of the Universe with Globular Clusters IV: Multiple Stellar Populations
summary: We revisit the determination of the age of the Universe from galactic globular clusters, extending previous analyses by explicitly accounting for the presence of multiple stellar populations within each cluster. Using high--quality \textit{Hubble Space Telescope} color--magnitude diagrams for 69 globular clusters, we relax the standard single--population assumption, and model two stellar populations with independent ages, metallicities, helium abundances, and population fractions. The inference is performed using the full color--magnitude diagram morphology, an explicit treatment of field contamination, and a hierarchical framework that propagates non--Gaussian age posteriors. Allowing for multiple stellar populations has a negligible impact on globular cluster age estimates. The ages of the oldest populations remain fully consistent with those obtained under the single--population assumption, with differences at the $0.6σ$ level. Restricting to the metal--poor subsample ([Fe/H] $< -1.5$), we infer a dominant old component with mean age $t_{\rm GC}=13.61\pm0.25\,\mathrm{(stat)}\,\pm0.23 \mathrm{(sys)}\,\mathrm{Gyr}$. Adopting a conservative delay between the Big Bang and the formation of the first globular clusters, we obtain an age of the Universe of $t_{\rm U}=13.81\pm0.25\,\mathrm{(stat)}\,\pm0.23 \mathrm{(sys)}\,\mathrm{Gyr}$. In addition to age constraints, our analysis yields simultaneous measurements of metallicity and helium content for the different populations, including constraints on helium enrichment and population fractions which are consistent with independent determinations from the literature. These results demonstrate that globular--cluster--based cosmic chronometry is robust to stellar population complexity, reinforcing its role as a precise and largely cosmological model--independent probe of the age of the Universe.

AI.tldr: 通过考虑球状星团(globular clusters)中多星族(multiple stellar populations)的影响并分析69个球状星团的高质量观测数据，发现多星族假设对年龄估算影响可忽略（差异仅0.6σ），测得最古老贫金属星族([Fe/H]<-1.5)平均年龄为13.61±0.25(统计)±0.23(系统)Gyr，推算宇宙年龄为13.81±0.25(统计)±0.23(系统)Gyr，证实球状星团宇宙计时法对星族复杂性具有鲁棒性。
AI.background: 研究主题为通过球状星团（globular clusters）的多重恒星族（multiple stellar populations）分析重新测定宇宙年龄，验证其作为宇宙计时器（cosmic chronometry）的可靠性。
AI.data: 数据来源于69个球状星团的高质量哈勃太空望远镜(Hubble Space Telescope)颜色-星等图(color-magnitude diagrams)。
AI.method: 采用基于哈勃太空望远镜(Hubble Space Telescope)高质量颜色-星等图的全形态建模方法，结合显式处理场污染和层次化框架传播非高斯年龄后验的统计推断技术，对球状星团中两个独立年龄、金属丰度、氦丰度及种群比例的恒星群体进行建模。
AI.result: 考虑多重恒星族群的球状星团年龄测定对宇宙年龄估算影响可忽略，金属贫乏亚样本中主导古老成分平均年龄为13.61±0.25(统计)±0.23(系统)Gyr，推算宇宙年龄为13.81±0.25(统计)±0.23(系统)Gyr。

title: Sensitivity of a closed dielectric haloscope to axion dark matter
summary: We present a method to determine the sensitivity of a closed dielectric haloscope to axion dark matter. Dielectric haloscopes aim to probe the theoretically well-motivated axion mass range of ~26 $\mathrmμ$eV to ~500 $\mathrmμ$eV by utilizing a stack of dielectric disks and a mirror to enhance the axion-photon conversion within an external magnetic field. Their conversion volume is nearly axion-mass independent, thereby favoring large-scale designs to increase sensitivity. The large volume causes simulations to be computationally expensive and time-consuming. This paper presents a simple model that can be used to determine the sensitivity of the experiment with minimal computational resources. The model is able to describe the electromagnetic response of a closed dielectric haloscope, accounting for realistic geometric imperfections, as well as the noise introduced by the receiver system. It is applied to data taken with a MAgnetized Disk and Mirror Axion Experiment (MADMAX) prototype within the 1.6 T Morpurgo magnet at CERN. This work underpins the first axion dark matter search using a dielectric haloscope and provides the foundation for future dark matter searches with MADMAX.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种计算封闭介质光晕仪（dielectric haloscope）对轴子暗物质（axion dark matter）灵敏度的简化模型，应用于MADMAX原型机在1.6 T磁场中的实验数据，为未来暗物质探测奠定基础。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用介电晕镜（dielectric haloscope）探测轴子暗物质（axion dark matter）的理论可行性和实验方法，特别针对26-500微电子伏特（μeV）质量范围的轴子。
AI.data: 数据来源于欧洲核子研究中心（CERN）的1.6 T Morpurgo磁体中进行的磁化盘与镜面轴子实验（MADMAX）原型机采集的数据。
AI.method: 采用简化电磁响应模型分析封闭式介电晕镜（dielectric haloscope）的灵敏度，该模型可处理几何缺陷和接收系统噪声，并应用于MADMAX原型机在1.6 T Morpurgo磁体中的实验数据。
AI.result: 提出了一种计算封闭介质光晕仪（dielectric haloscope）对轴子暗物质（axion dark matter）灵敏度的简化模型，该模型能准确描述实际几何缺陷和接收系统噪声的电磁响应。

title: Euclid: A blue galaxy population and a brightest cluster galaxy in the making in a $z\sim1.74$ MaDCoWS2 galaxy cluster candidate
comment: Accepted by A&A; 15 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables
summary: We present an example cluster follow-up study with Euclid. Our target, a $z\sim 1.74$ candidate cluster nicknamed the `Puddle', was initially discovered by the Massive and Distant Clusters of WISE Survey 2 (MaDCoWS2) as a $z_{phot}\sim 1.65$ candidate cluster. It was also detected independently as a $z_{phot}\sim 1.5$ candidate with both cluster-finding algorithms in Euclid Quick Release 1 (Q1). A Keck MOSFIRE spectrum shows the brightest nucleus is at $z=1.74$ and is AGN-dominated. We focus our analysis on the galaxy population and the Brightest Cluster Galaxy (BCG), using a combination of Euclid and ancillary photometry. Compared to similar fields, we measure an overdensity of $110\pm 14$ galaxies with $H_\mathrm{E}\leq 22.25$ in a 2' radius around the BCG. We estimate that $18\pm 4$% of the completeness-corrected galaxy population is red, which is consistent with some clusters at $z>1.5$ but lower than others. \textit{Euclid} imaging reveals that six or seven galaxies appear to be assembling to form the future BCG. Spectral energy distribution (SED) fitting suggests that the merging BCG has a stellar mass of $5.7\pm 0.3\times 10^{11}\,M_\odot$ and experienced a short burst of star formation about $300\,$Myr ago. Its morphology, stellar mass, and star-formation history suggest that the proto-BCG is a more evolved version of the merging core of SPT2349$-$56. These systems indicate that multiobject mergers might be a common BCG formation process. Assuming a similar density of mergers in the Euclid Wide Survey, we expect that Euclid will discover approximately 400 assembling BCGs by the end of its mission.

AI.tldr: 利用欧几里得(Euclid)望远镜观测发现红移(redshift)z~1.74的候选星系团"Puddle"中存在由6-7个星系正在合并形成未来最亮团星系(BCG)，其恒星质量为(5.7±0.3)×10¹¹M☉且300百万年前经历短暂星暴，表明多体合并可能是BCG形成的普遍机制。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于高红移（$z>1.5$）星系团（galaxy cluster）的发现与演化机制，特别是最亮团星系（BCG）通过多体并合（multiobject merger）的形成过程。
AI.data: 数据来源于欧几里得(Euclid) Quick Release 1 (Q1)的观测数据、Keck MOSFIRE光谱数据以及辅助测光数据。
AI.method: 采用欧几里得(Euclid)和辅助测光数据，结合光谱能量分布(SED)拟合方法分析星系群和最亮团星系(BCG)。
AI.result: 在2'半径范围内，BCG（Brightest Cluster Galaxy）周围存在110±14个HE≤22.25的星系过密度，其中18±4%的星系呈红色，与部分z>1.5的星系团一致但低于其他星系团。

title: Fusion of JWST data - Demonstrating practical feasibility
summary: Data fusion is a computational process widely used in Earth observation to generate high-resolution hyperspectral data cubes with two spatial and one spectral dimensions. It merges data from instruments with complementary characteristics: one with low spatial but high spectral resolutions, and another with high spatial but low spectral resolutions. In astronomy, the use of such instrumental combinations is becoming increasingly common, making data fusion a promising approach for enhancing observational data. Until now, however, its application to astronomical data has remained unsuccessful. We present the first successful astronomical data fusion using JWST integral field spectroscopy with NIRSpec and imaging across 29 filters with NIRCam. Applied to observations of the d203-506 protoplanetary disk in Orion and of Titan, our method produces fused hyperspectral cubes with NIRCam spatial and NIRSpec spectral resolutions. These results pave the way for extracting the physical properties from JWST data with unprecedented spatial resolution and showcase the transformative potential of data fusion in astronomy.

AI.tldr: 首次成功将JWST（James Webb Space Telescope）的NIRSpec积分场光谱与NIRCam多波段成像数据融合，生成兼具NIRCam空间分辨率和NIRSpec光谱分辨率的高光谱数据立方体（hyperspectral cube），为天文观测提供了前所未有的空间分辨率物理特性提取方法。
AI.background: 数据融合（data fusion）在天文学中用于提升观测数据质量，通过结合不同仪器的互补特性（如高空间分辨率与高光谱分辨率）来生成高分辨率高光谱数据立方体。
AI.data: 数据来源于JWST（James Webb Space Telescope）的积分视场光谱仪NIRSpec和29个滤光片成像仪NIRCam的观测数据。
AI.method: 采用数据融合（data fusion）技术结合JWST的NIRSpec积分场光谱仪和NIRCam多波段成像数据。
AI.result: 首次成功将JWST的NIRSpec积分场光谱与NIRCam 29个滤光片成像数据融合，生成了兼具NIRCam空间分辨率和NIRSpec光谱分辨率的超光谱立方体。

title: Accelerated size evolution in the FirstLight simulations from z=14 to z=5
comment: 12 papes, 10 figures submitted to A&A. Database of synthetic images available at http://odin.ft.uam.es/FirstLight/index.html
summary: Galaxies grow very rapidly during the first Gyr of the Universe, mostly driven by high galaxy efficiencies, particularly relevant at $z>5$. This efficiency is related to high gas densities and/or compact gas distributions within these early galaxies. We want to understand the evolution of the size of galaxies at cosmic dawn, from $z=14$ to $z=5$ and its main drivers. We use the FirstLight database of 430 zoom-in cosmological simulations and radiative transfer calculations to generate synthetic images in seven JWST bands. We add observational effects, inspired by recent JWST deep extragalactic surveys. The size-mass relation is already in place at $z\simeq14$ and it shows a large diversity of galaxy sizes at a fixed mass. Extended (compact) galaxies tend to have higher (lower) specific star-formation rate (sSFR). The mass-dependent slope does not evolve significantly. This is driven by a complex interaction between stellar light and dust. Differential dust attenuation dims galaxy centers and it makes larger sizes, modifying the mass-size slope even in the rest-frame optical. At a fixed mass, galaxy size evolves very fast, as the normalization of the size-mass relation increases by 0.5 dex between $z\simeq14$ and $z\simeq6$, in 600 Myr. The SFR surface density increases with redshift, driven by higher sSFRs and smaller sizes at higher redshifts. Size evolution at a fixed stellar mass accelerates at cosmic dawn, driven by an increasing galaxy efficiency at $z\geq5$.

AI.tldr: 基于430个宇宙学模拟和辐射传输计算，研究发现宇宙黎明期（红移z=14至z=5）星系尺寸-质量关系已形成且呈现多样性，尺寸随质量快速演化（600 Myr内增加0.5 dex），主要由红移≥5时星系效率（galaxy efficiency）提升驱动，且恒星形成率面密度（SFR surface density）随红移增加而升高。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于宇宙黎明时期（$z=14$至$z=5$）星系尺寸的演化及其驱动机制，特别是高红移（$z>5$）下星系效率（galaxy efficiency）与气体密度或致密分布的关联性。
AI.data: 使用FirstLight数据库中的430个放大宇宙学模拟（zoom-in cosmological simulations）和辐射传输计算生成七个JWST波段的合成图像，并添加受近期JWST深场河外巡天启发的观测效应。
AI.method: 采用430个放大宇宙学模拟(zoom-in cosmological simulations)和辐射传输计算(radiative transfer calculations)生成七个JWST波段的合成图像，并叠加受近期JWST深场河外巡天启发的观测效应。
AI.result: 星系尺寸-质量关系在红移约14时已形成，且固定质量下星系尺寸呈现高度多样性。

title: Simultaneous Misalignment and Mode Mismatch Sensing in Optical Cavities Using Intensity-Only Measurements
comment: 17 pages, 11 figures
summary: Precise sensing and control of spatial mode content is essential for the performance of precision optical systems, particularly interferometric gravitational-wave detectors, where misalignment and mode mismatch can lead to significant optical losses and degraded quantum noise suppression. Conventional approaches, including heterodyne wavefront sensing and phase camera techniques, are effective but can be limited by hardware complexity and systematic uncertainties arising from restricted reference-beam overlap. This paper presents a novel two-step deep learning pipeline for robust beam diagnostics based solely on beam intensity images. In the first stage, a multi-intensity-image convolutional neural network (CNN) performs accurate mode decomposition, recovering the complex modal content of distorted beams. In the second stage, the predicted mode coefficients are fed into a downstream regression network that simultaneously estimates all eight degrees of freedom (DoFs) associated with misalignment and mode mismatch, including beam tilt, lateral offset, and waist size and position mismatches in both transverse directions. The proposed CNN-based framework achieves a mean absolute error (MAE) of 0.0034 in the mode decomposition stage, which propagates to a total MAE of 0.0062 in the recovered beam imperfection parameters at the final stage. This corresponds to an average residual optical loss of 39 ppm per DoF (310 ppm total). This approach relies only on standard CCD imaging and is robust to random intensity noise, eliminating the need for complex interferometric hardware. The results demonstrate that the proposed deep learning pipeline enables real-time, high-accuracy wavefront sensing and mode-mismatch diagnostics, providing a scalable and hardware-efficient tool for improving the stability and sensitivity of precision optical systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于卷积神经网络(CNN)的两步深度学习框架，仅通过光束强度图像即可实现高精度模式分解和八自由度(DoFs)失调参数估计，为精密光学系统提供了硬件高效的实时波前传感解决方案。
AI.background: 精密光学系统（尤其是干涉型引力波探测器）中空间模式（spatial mode）的精确传感与控制对抑制光学损耗和量子噪声至关重要。
AI.data: 数据来源于标准CCD（电荷耦合器件）成像采集的单一光束强度图像。
AI.method: 采用基于多强度图像卷积神经网络(CNN)的两阶段深度学习流程，先通过CNN实现精确模式分解，再通过回归网络同时估计八个自由度(DoFs)的失准和模式失配参数。
AI.result: 提出了一种基于深度学习的两阶段方法，仅利用光束强度图像即可实现高精度波前传感和模式失配诊断，其中卷积神经网络（CNN）在模态分解阶段达到0.0034的平均绝对误差（MAE），最终阶段恢复的光束缺陷参数总MAE为0.0062，对应每自由度（DoF）平均残余光学损耗为39 ppm。

title: On curvature corrections for field theory cosmic strings
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures. Comments are welcome. A movie of the simulation can be found in https://youtu.be/0qi1brTlTSg
summary: We present a combined analytical and numerical study of the effective action of field theory cosmic strings in the Abelian-Higgs model in flat space. Starting directly from the underlying solitonic field theory description, we provide a systematic derivation of the low energy effective action and present evidence for the absence of nontrivial curvature correction terms when only the translational Goldstone modes are retained. Using this framework, we extend the effective theory to include higher energy fluctuations of the soliton profile, which map to massive degrees of freedom propagating on the worldsheet. We show that the leading curvature contribution enters only through the coupling between these massive modes and the worldsheet Ricci scalar. We validate the resulting effective theory via lattice simulations of the full field theory equations of motion in flat space, implemented with Adaptive Mesh Refinement to capture the string dynamics across different scales. The numerical simulations confirm the dynamics obtained using the effective action in its validity range. Furthermore, they also demonstrate the existence of the predicted parametric instability of excited strings that drives the transfer of energy from massive excitations to the Goldstone sector.

AI.tldr: 在平坦空间中基于阿贝尔-希格斯模型（Abelian-Higgs model）的系统性推导表明，仅保留平移戈德斯通模（Goldstone modes）时有效作用量无曲率修正项，且高阶涨落通过耦合世界面里奇标量（worldsheet Ricci scalar）引入主导曲率贡献。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于平坦空间中阿贝尔-希格斯模型（Abelian-Higgs model）场论宇宙弦（cosmic strings）有效作用量的解析与数值分析。
AI.data: 数据来源于基于自适应网格加密（Adaptive Mesh Refinement）技术的平直空间中完整场论运动方程格点模拟（lattice simulations）。
AI.method: 采用解析推导与数值模拟（Adaptive Mesh Refinement）相结合的方法，从孤子场论描述出发系统推导低能有效作用量，并通过晶格模拟验证其动力学行为。
AI.result: 在平坦空间中，阿贝尔-希格斯模型（Abelian-Higgs model）的场论宇宙弦（cosmic strings）有效作用量研究显示，当仅保留平移戈德斯通模（Goldstone modes）时不存在非平凡曲率修正项。

title: Scientific performance of on-board analyses for the SVOM X-ray telescope MXT
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, SVOM special issue (RAA)
summary: The Microchannel X-ray Telescope on board the Space-based multi-band astronomical Variable Objects Monitor (SVOM) satellite detects and localizes the X-ray afterglow of gamma-ray bursts. One year after the launch, this paper presents the in-flight performance of the scientific analyses conducted by the on-board computer. After summarizing the analysis steps, the paper reviews the on-board results obtained with 15 gamma-ray burst afterglows detected by the telescope between October 2024 and August 2025. For all bursts, the localization uncertainty is estimated to be below 2 arcmin, as required by the mission design. On average, the measured position is found to be 40 arcsec away from the position measured by other experiments with a better sky resolution. Moreover, we show that the on-board analysis provides a precise sky location for the burst only a few seconds after the beginning of the observation. Taking advantage of an efficient very-high-frequency antenna network, this information is quickly collected on the ground and disseminated to other observation facilities. This low-latency strategy is critical for the multi-wavelength and multi-instrument follow-up program of SVOM.

AI.tldr: 基于SVOM卫星搭载的微通道X射线望远镜(Microchannel X-ray Telescope)对15例伽马暴余辉的观测数据，证实其星载计算机能在数秒内实现优于2角分的定位精度（平均偏差40角秒），并通过高效甚高频天线网络快速下传数据，为多波段后续观测提供了关键支持。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于SVOM卫星搭载的微通道X射线望远镜（Microchannel X-ray Telescope）在探测和定位伽马射线暴（gamma-ray bursts）X射线余辉方面的在轨性能评估与科学应用。
AI.data: 数据来源于搭载在SVOM卫星上的微通道X射线望远镜（Microchannel X-ray Telescope）在2024年10月至2025年8月期间探测到的15个伽马射线暴余辉的观测数据。
AI.method: 采用微通道X射线望远镜（Microchannel X-ray Telescope）进行在轨实时分析，结合高效甚高频（very-high-frequency）天线网络实现低延迟定位。
AI.result: 在轨分析能在观测开始后数秒内提供伽马暴（gamma-ray burst）的精确天区位置。

title: Exploring the chemical evolution in hot molecular cores
comment: accepted in Boletín de la Asociación Argentina de Astronomía (March, 2026)
summary: We present preliminary results of an extensive research project aimed at describing the physical and chemical conditions of hot molecular cores (HMCs). Using millimeter continuum and spectroscopic data extracted from the Atacama Large Millimeter Array (ALMA) archive, we have estimated rotational temperatures ($\rm T_{rot}$) and column densities of $\rm{CH_{3}CN}$, $\rm{CH_{3}CCH}$, and A-- and E--$\rm CH_{3}OH$ for a sample of molecular cores. We present a thermal characterization of these cores, revealing the existence of temperature gradients within them. These cores are, in turn, embedded in large molecular clouds. Additionally, we estimated molecular abundances that were evaluated as tracers of the chemical evolution of these cores. Finally, in a pilot study aimed to link observations with simulations, some of the obtained molecular abundances are compared with predictions from the Nautilus code.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA（Atacama Large Millimeter Array）数据首次揭示了热分子核（hot molecular cores, HMCs）内部存在温度梯度，并通过测量CH₃CN、CH₃CCH和CH₃OH的转动温度（T₃rot）与柱密度，结合Nautilus模型模拟验证了其化学演化示踪物的分子丰度。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于热分子核（hot molecular cores, HMCs）的物理与化学条件表征及其在分子云中的演化过程。
AI.data: 数据来源于阿塔卡马大型毫米波阵列（ALMA）档案中的毫米波连续谱和光谱数据。
AI.method: 基于阿塔卡马大型毫米波阵列(ALMA)存档数据，采用毫米波连续谱和光谱分析技术，通过旋转温度($\rm T_{rot}$)和柱密度估计方法对热分子核(HMCs)进行了热力学表征。
AI.result: 在热分子核（HMCs）中发现了温度梯度，并测定了CH3CN、CH3CCH以及A-和E-CH3OH的转动温度（Trot）和柱密度。

title: Experiments towards a neutron target for measurements in inverse kinematics
comment: 23 pages, 17 figures
summary: Neutron-induced reactions play an important role in fundamental nuclear physics, nuclear astrophysics, and applications. In the case of reactions on rare isotopes, there are limited options for direct experimental measurements. The Neutron Target Demonstrator project at Los Alamos National Laboratory seeks to test the feasibility of moderating spallation neutrons within a 1~m$^3$ graphite cube to create a standing neutron target for neutron-induced reaction measurements in inverse kinematics. This paper presents the results of experimental neutron flux distribution tests using neutron sources (ranging from 1~keV to 50~MeV) created by accelerators at the University of Notre Dame and Texas A\&M University. Measurements were made with both the full graphite cube as well as a ''half cube'' setup in which half of the graphite cube was removed. The measured distributions agree with simulated distributions in the case of the full cube moderator, although there remain discrepancies in certain cases for the half cube moderator. The results shown here will provide useful information for an upcoming experimental campaign to test the neutron target proof-of-principle.

AI.tldr: 在洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室的中子靶演示项目（Neutron Target Demonstrator）中，通过实验测量和模拟验证了1立方米石墨立方体（full cube）和半立方体（half cube）对1 keV至50 MeV能区中子源的慢化效果，为逆向运动学中子诱发反应测量提供了原理验证依据。
AI.background: 中子诱发反应（neutron-induced reactions）在基础核物理、核天体物理和应用领域具有重要作用。
AI.data: 数据来源于美国圣母大学和德州农工大学加速器产生的1 keV至50 MeV能区中子源，以及1立方米石墨立方体完整和半立方体构型的实验测量。
AI.method: 采用石墨立方体（graphite cube）作为慢化剂（moderator）测量中子通量分布（neutron flux distribution），并通过实验与模拟结果对比验证可行性。
AI.result: 在1~m$^3$石墨立方体（full cube moderator）中测量的中子通量分布与模拟结果一致，但半立方体（half cube moderator）配置在部分情况下仍存在差异。

title: HC$_3$N, H$^{13}$CN, and HN$^{13}$C in molecular cores evolving towards star-forming regions
comment: Accepted in Boletín de la Asociación Argentina de Astronomía (March, 2026)
summary: As a work in progress, results from a chemical and physical analysis of molecular cores in early evolutionary stages concerning star formation are presented. Using archival data from the Atacama Large Millimeter Array (ALMA), a sample of 37 sources was investigated, from which spectra in the frequency range 330--350 GHz were extracted towards the central positions of the molecular cores. Transitions of HC$_3$N, H$^{13}$CN, and HN$^{13}$C were analysed using Gaussian fits, obtaining peak intensities, fluxes, and line widths. The column densities of each molecule and their abundances were estimated. The behaviour of these abundances with the temperature of the region was studied, observing positive correlations for H$^{13}$CN and HN$^{13}$C, and none for HC$_3$N. This study contributes to the characterisation of the initial conditions of the interstellar medium in early phases of stellar evolution.

AI.tldr: 通过分析37个分子核（molecular cores）在330-350 GHz频段的谱线，发现H$^{13}$CN和HN$^{13}$C丰度与区域温度呈正相关，而HC$_3$N无此关联，揭示了恒星演化早期星际介质的初始化学条件。
AI.background: 研究聚焦恒星形成早期阶段分子核（molecular cores）的化学与物理特性，旨在揭示星际介质初始条件对恒星演化的影响。
AI.data: 使用阿塔卡马大型毫米波阵列(ALMA)的存档数据，分析了37个分子核中心位置在330-350 GHz频段的光谱。
AI.method: 采用高斯拟合(Gaussian fits)分析ALMA档案数据中HC$_3$N、H$^{13}$CN和HN$^{13}$C的谱线，获取峰值强度、流量和线宽，并估算柱密度与丰度。
AI.result: 在恒星形成早期阶段，分子核的化学和物理分析揭示了H$^{13}$CN和HN$^{13}$C丰度与区域温度呈正相关，而HC$_3$N无此相关性。

title: NASA's Pandora SmallSat Mission: Simulated Modeling and Retrieval of Near-Infrared Exoplanet Transmission Spectra
comment: Accepted for publication in AJ; 22 pages, 10 figures
summary: Pandora is a SmallSat mission dedicated to understanding exoplanets and their host stars by disentangling the impact of stellar heterogeneity on exoplanet transmission spectra. Selected as a NASA Astrophysics Pioneers mission in 2021, Pandora will provide simultaneous long-term visible photometric monitoring (0.4--0.7 $μ$m) and low-resolution near-infrared (NIR) spectroscopy (0.9--1.6 $μ$m) of transiting systems for the purposes of monitoring host star variability and characterizing exoplanetary atmospheres. Pandora's year-long prime mission from 2026 to 2027 coincides with the middle of a decade defined by targeted efforts for atmospheric characterization of exoplanets, offering a key opportunity to leverage this new resource to maximize science with JWST and other observatories. Here we investigate Pandora's anticipated performance for the general exoplanet population accessible to transit spectroscopy, from hot Jupiters to temperate sub-Neptunes. By modeling the atmospheres of five test cases broadly consistent with the bulk properties of HD~209458~b, HD~189733~b, WASP-80~b, HAT-P-18~b, and K2-18~b, we find that Pandora may provide abundance constraints as precise as $\sim$1.0\,dex for main atmospheric absorbers such as H$_2$O and CH$_4$. Then, we explore the synergies between Pandora and JWST.
