Our results suggest that targets with JWST data in the near-infrared can benefit from the addition of Pandora observations and result in more reliable abundance estimates than with JWST data alone. Moreover, Pandora can serve the community by providing precursory observations of targets of interest for JWST atmospheric characterization. We conclude by outlining strategies for the use of Pandora as a standalone observatory and in synergy with JWST.

AI.tldr: 潘多拉(Pandora)小型卫星任务通过同步可见光光度监测和近红外(NIR)光谱观测，解决了恒星异质性对系外行星透射光谱的影响问题，并能将H2O和CH4等主要大气吸收成分的丰度约束精度提升至约1.0 dex，与JWST协同观测可进一步提高大气特征分析的可靠性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于通过解析恒星异质性（stellar heterogeneity）对系外行星透射光谱的影响来理解系外行星及其宿主恒星。
AI.data: 数据来源于潘多拉(Pandora)小卫星任务提供的可见光光度监测(0.4--0.7 μm)和近红外(NIR)光谱(0.9--1.6 μm)观测数据。
AI.method: 采用同步可见光光度监测(0.4-0.7μm)和低分辨率近红外光谱(0.9-1.6μm)技术，结合大气模型对系外行星(如HD 209458 b等)的主要吸收成分(H2O、CH4)进行丰度约束分析。
AI.result: 潘多拉(Pandora)任务通过分离恒星异质性对系外行星透射光谱的影响，将提供对主恒星变率的长期监测和系外行星大气特征的精确表征。

title: EMU/GAMA: A statistical perspective on active galactic nuclei diagnostics
comment: Accepted for publication in PASA. 19 pages, 9 figures, and 4 tables
summary: While it is well known that galaxies are composites of many emission processes, quantifying the various contributions remains challenging. In this work, we use unsupervised machine learning based clustering algorithms to evaluate the agreement between the clustering tools and astrophysical classifications, and hence quantify the fractional contributions of star formation processes and nuclear black hole activity to the total galaxy energy budget of radio sources. We perform clustering on the multiwavelength (optical, infrared (IR), and radio) active galactic nuclei (AGN) diagnostic spaces, using the data from the G09 and G23 fields from the Galaxy and Mass Assembly (GAMA) survey, Evolutionary Map of the Universe (EMU) survey, and the Wide-field Infrared Survey Explorer (WISE). We find that the statistical clustering recovers $\approx$ 90 % of the star forming galaxies (SFGs) and $\approx$ 80 % of the AGN. We define a new IR-radio AGN diagnostic scheme that identifies radio AGN from IR SFGs and AGN, corresponding to the KMeans cluster with approximately 90 % reliability. We demonstrate the superior power of radio AGN selection in higher dimensions using a three-dimensional space composed of directly observable parameters ($\rm W_1-W_2$ colour, $\rm W_2$ magnitude, and the 1.4 GHz radio flux density). This novel three dimensional diagnostic shows immense potential in radio AGN selection that is close to 90 % reliable and 90 % complete. We also publish a catalogue of radio sources in the EMU survey with associated probabilities for them to be active in the optical regime, through which we emphasise the philosophy of considering a galaxy to be composed of various fractions rather than a binary classification of SFGs and AGN.

AI.tldr: 利用无监督机器学习聚类算法在多波段（光学、红外、射电）AGN（活动星系核）诊断空间中量化了恒星形成过程和核黑洞活动对射电源总能量预算的贡献比例，开发了可靠性达90%的新型红外-射电AGN三维诊断方案（基于W1-W2颜色、W2星等和1.4 GHz射电流量密度），并发布了包含光学活动概率的射电源星表。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用无监督机器学习聚类算法量化星系总能量预算中恒星形成过程与核黑洞活动（AGN）的相对贡献。
AI.data: 数据来源于星系与质量组装巡天（GAMA）的G09和G23天区、演化宇宙地图巡天（EMU）以及广域红外巡天探测器（WISE）的多波段（光学、红外和射电）观测数据。
AI.method: 采用无监督机器学习聚类算法分析多波段（光学、红外和射电）活动星系核（AGN）诊断空间数据，并定义新的红外-射电AGN诊断方案。
AI.result: 基于多波段（光学、红外、射电）数据和无监督机器学习聚类算法，开发了一种新型三维（$\rm W_1-W_2$颜色、$\rm W_2$星等和1.4 GHz射电流量密度）射电活动星系核（AGN）诊断方案，其选择可靠性接近90%且完备性达90%。

title: Augmenting representations with scientific papers
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Foundation Models for Science (ICLR 2026)
summary: Astronomers have acquired vast repositories of multimodal data, including images, spectra, and time series, complemented by decades of literature that analyzes astrophysical sources. Still, these data sources are rarely systematically integrated. This work introduces a contrastive learning framework designed to align X-ray spectra with domain knowledge extracted from scientific literature, facilitating the development of shared multimodal representations. Establishing this connection is inherently complex, as scientific texts encompass a broader and more diverse physical context than spectra. We propose a contrastive pipeline that achieves a 20% Recall@1% when retrieving texts from spectra, proving that a meaningful alignment between these modalities is not only possible but capable of accelerating the interpretation of rare or poorly understood sources. Furthermore, the resulting shared latent space effectively encodes physically significant information. By fusing spectral and textual data, we improve the estimation of 20 physical variables by 16-18% over unimodal spectral baselines. Our results indicate that a Mixture of Experts (MoE) strategy, which leverages both unimodal and shared representations, yields superior performance. Finally, outlier analysis within the multimodal latent space identifies high-priority targets for follow-up investigation, including a candidate pulsating ULX (PULX) and a gravitational lens system. Importantly, this framework can be extended to other scientific domains where aligning observational data with existing literature is possible.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种对比学习框架，通过将X射线光谱与科学文献提取的领域知识对齐，建立了共享多模态表征，显著提升了罕见天体源（如候选脉动超亮X射线源PULX和引力透镜系统）的物理解释精度和20个物理变量的估计性能（比单模态基线提高16-18%）。
AI.background: 研究主题为通过对比学习框架整合X射线光谱与科学文献中的领域知识，建立多模态共享表征以加速天体物理源（astrophysical sources）的解读。
AI.data: 数据来源包括X射线光谱（X-ray spectra）和从科学文献中提取的领域知识（domain knowledge extracted from scientific literature）。
AI.method: 采用对比学习框架（contrastive learning framework）对齐X射线光谱与从科学文献中提取的领域知识，并开发共享多模态表征。
AI.result: 引入对比学习框架将X射线光谱与文献提取的领域知识对齐，建立共享多模态表征空间，提升罕见天体源解析效率。

title: The Local Tremaine-Weinberg Method for Galactic Pattern Speed: Theory and its Application to IllustrisTNG
comment: 30 pages, 14 figures, accepted for publication in Research in Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: The Tremaine-Weinberg (TW) method and its variations provide the most direct means to measure the pattern speeds of galactic bars. We establish a unifying framework by deriving an integral form of the continuity equation over an arbitrary closed loop. This naturally defines a local pattern speed for any chosen region in a galactic disk (including bars and spirals). We demonstrate that this intuitive formalism recovers all standard variants of the TW method as special cases corresponding to specific choices of the integration loop. In this paper, we validate this framework and demonstrate its diagnostic power. By applying it to a diverse set of test cases from the TNG50 simulation, including face-on prototype barred galaxies and highly constrained Mock Milky Way standard configurations, we show that this formalism accurately recovers both constant global pattern speeds and radially varying profiles. Rather than relying on rigid geometric approximations, our method naturally differentiates coherent solid-body rotators (bars) from spirals. Our results validate that this unified integral framework provides a robust, geometrically flexible, and practically extensible tool for decoding complex dynamics of galactic structures.

AI.tldr: 提出基于任意闭合环路积分形式的统一框架，可精确测量星系盘（包括棒旋结构和旋臂）的局部模式速度（pattern speed），并通过TNG50模拟验证其能区分刚性旋转体（棒）与旋臂，恢复恒定或径向变化的全局模式速度。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于建立测量星系棒（galactic bars）和螺旋结构模式速度（pattern speed）的统一积分框架，通过推导连续性方程在任意闭合环路上的积分形式，实现对星系盘中不同区域局部模式速度的精确测定。
AI.data: 数据来源于TNG50模拟（TNG50 simulation），包括正面观测的原型棒旋星系和高度约束的模拟银河系标准构型（Mock Milky Way standard configurations）。
AI.method: 通过推导连续性方程在任意闭合环路上的积分形式，建立了一个统一框架来定义星系盘（包括棒和旋臂）中任意区域的局部模式速度（pattern speed）。
AI.result: 通过推导连续性方程在任意闭合环路上的积分形式，建立了一个统一框架来测量星系盘（包括棒旋结构和旋臂）的局部模式速度（pattern speed），并验证了该框架在恢复恒定全局模式速度和径向变化轮廓方面的准确性。

title: NASA's $\textit{Pandora SmallSat Mission}$: Simulating the Impact of Stellar Photospheric Heterogeneity and Its Correction
comment: Submitted to AJ
summary: Stellar photospheric heterogeneity is a dominant astrophysical systematic impacting exoplanet transmission spectroscopy. NASA's Pandora SmallSat Mission is designed to address this challenge through contemporaneous visible photometry and NIR spectroscopy of exoplanet host stars. Here we present an end-to-end simulation study quantifying Pandora's ability to infer stellar photospheric properties and correct stellar contamination using out-of-transit observations. We construct eight representative stellar activity scenarios and generate 160 simulated Pandora datasets, incorporating time-dependent stellar spectra, instrument response, and noise. Bayesian retrievals of joint visible photometry and NIR spectroscopy recover photospheric temperatures with typical uncertainties of ${\approx}30$ K, with no significant bias. Models with two spectral components (i.e., quiescent photosphere and spots) are strongly favored in 95% of cases; one-component models are preferred when true spot filling factors fall below a detection threshold of ${\approx}0.3$%. We propagate the true and inferred stellar parameters to compute true, inferred, and residual contamination signals under physically motivated spot geometries. For simple spot distributions, contamination signals of $10^2{-}10^3$ ppm are reduced to ${\lesssim}10$ ppm, well below Pandora's expected transmission spectroscopy precision (30$-$100 ppm). For more complex spot distributions, geometric degeneracies limit deterministic corrections, leaving residual contamination at the $10^3$ ppm level that must be mitigated using additional constraints, such as spot-crossing events and joint stellar-planetary retrievals of transmission spectra. These results define regimes in which stellar contamination can be corrected from stellar observations alone and show how Pandora stellar observations can identify cases where additional information is required.

AI.tldr: 潘多拉（Pandora）小卫星任务通过联合可见光测光和近红外光谱观测，量化了恒星光球（photosphere）活动（温度误差≈30 K）对系外行星透射光谱的污染（10²-10³ ppm降至≲10 ppm），并确定了单/双组分模型的适用条件（斑点填充因子检测阈值≈0.3%）及复杂斑点分布下的残余污染水平（10³ ppm）。
AI.background: 恒星光球层异质性（stellar photospheric heterogeneity）是影响系外行星透射光谱的主要天体物理系统误差来源。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源为模拟生成的160组Pandora任务数据集，包含随时间变化的恒星光谱（time-dependent stellar spectra）、仪器响应（instrument response）和噪声（noise），基于八种典型恒星活动场景构建。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯反演方法(Bayesian retrieval)联合可见光测光和近红外光谱数据，结合双组分光谱模型（宁静光球和黑子）量化恒星光球特性。
AI.result: 贝叶斯反演结合可见光测光和近红外光谱可恢复恒星光球温度，典型不确定度为约30 K且无显著偏差。

title: ULTIMATE deblending I. A 50-band UV-to-MIR photometric catalog combining space- and ground-based data in the JWST/PRIMER survey
comment: 21 pages, 11 figures, 4 tables, submitted to APJS
summary: Our understanding of the early Universe has long been limited by biased galaxy samples selected through various color criteria. With deep JWST infrared imaging, mass-complete galaxy samples can now be studied up to $z \sim 8$ for the first time. However, recent work has revealed systematic uncertainties in measuring physical properties of galaxies based solely on JWST/NIRCam and HST photometry, due to their limited wavelength coverage. This highlights the need for supplementary data, particularly in the rest-frame UV and near-infrared. Here we present the ULTIMATE-deblending project, which will eventually deliver self-consistent UV-to-Radio photometry for galaxies detected in deep JWST surveys, including both NIRCam and MIRI data. In this first paper, we release a 50-band photometric catalog spanning CFHT/U to JWST/MIRI F1800W, covering a total of 627.1 arcmin$^2$ across two JWST/PRIMER fields. We detail the reduction of JWST imaging data, the photometric procedures, and the SED-fitting methodology used to derive galaxy properties. Compared with photometry including only HST and JWST bands, the inclusion of deblended low-resolution photometry from ground-based telescopes improves the accuracy of photometric redshifts by $\sim$40%, while reducing the outlier fraction by $\sim$60%. This galaxy sample can serve as a key reference for statistical studies of galaxy formation and evolution in the early universe. All catalogs and JWST mosaics from the ULTIMATE-deblending project will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 通过整合地面望远镜和JWST（James Webb Space Telescope）多波段数据，ULTIMATE-deblending项目首次为高红移（z~8）星系提供了自洽的紫外至射电连续谱（UV-to-Radio）测光数据，将测光红移精度提升40%并减少60%异常值，为早期宇宙星系形成与演化研究建立了关键基准样本。
AI.background: 早期宇宙研究中因颜色选择偏差导致的星系样本局限性问题。
AI.data: 数据来源于JWST（NIRCam和MIRI）和HST的深场成像数据，以及地面望远镜（如CFHT）的低分辨率测光数据，覆盖了从CFHT/U波段到JWST/MIRI F1800W波段的50个波段，总面积为627.1平方角分。
AI.method: 采用多波段（从CFHT/U到JWST/MIRI F1800W）测光数据结合光谱能量分布拟合（SED-fitting）方法，并整合地面望远镜的低分辨率测光数据以提高精度。
AI.result: ULTIMATE-deblending项目通过整合地基望远镜的低分辨率测光数据与JWST（James Webb Space Telescope）观测，将光度红移（photometric redshift）精度提升约40%，同时将异常值比例降低约60%。

title: Resolving diffusion signatures in distant pulsar halos with current and future experiments
summary: Pulsar halos provide a unique probe of cosmic-ray propagation in the vicinity of pulsars and have important implications for our understanding of particle diffusion in the interstellar medium. However, the number of firmly identified pulsar halos remains limited. One of the main challenges is the difficulty in unambiguously confirming halo candidates through precise morphological measurements with current $γ$-ray observations. In this work, we investigate the prospects for identifying pulsar halo candidates through morphological discrimination using simulations of two advanced $γ$-ray experiments: LHAASO-KM2A and the Cherenkov Telescope Array (CTA). Using mock observations with realistic instrumental responses, we assess the ability of each experiment to distinguish diffusion-based halo morphologies from alternative simplified spatial models. Our results show that both increased photon statistics and improved angular resolution significantly enhance the power of morphological discrimination. In particular, CTA benefits from its superior angular resolution, while LHAASO-KM2A gains sensitivity from its large effective area at the highest energies. These results indicate that future $γ$-ray observations have the potential to expand the sample of pulsar halos and provide further insights into cosmic-ray transport around pulsars.

AI.tldr: 通过模拟LHAASO-KM2A和CTA实验，发现提升光子统计量和角分辨率能显著增强对脉冲星晕（pulsar halos）候选体的形态鉴别能力，有助于扩大样本并研究脉冲星周围宇宙射线传输机制。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用脉冲星晕（pulsar halos）作为宇宙射线在脉冲星附近传播的独特探针，及其对星际介质中粒子扩散机制理解的重要意义。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源于模拟两个先进γ射线实验（LHAASO-KM2A和切伦科夫望远镜阵列CTA）的虚拟观测（mock observations），并采用了真实的仪器响应（realistic instrumental responses）。
AI.method: 采用模拟观测方法评估LHAASO-KM2A和切伦科夫望远镜阵列(CTA)通过形态学区分识别脉冲星晕候选体的能力，重点分析扩散模型与简化空间模型的区分效能。
AI.result: result：未来γ射线观测（LHAASO-KM2A和CTA）通过提升光子统计量和角分辨率可显著增强脉冲星晕（pulsar halos）形态鉴别能力，从而扩大样本并深化对脉冲星周围宇宙线传输的理解。

title: GASTON-GP: Source catalogue and millimetre variability of massive protostellar objects
comment: Accepted by MNRAS
summary: The processes governing protostellar mass growth remain debated, although episodic accretion is now understood as a key feature of protostellar evolution across all masses. Luminosity bursts have been observed in both low- and high-mass protostars, but the overall statistics remain limited, especially for high-mass objects. Over the past decade, numerical simulations of high-mass core collapse have provided a theoretical framework for interpreting protostellar variability, yet additional observational constraints are required to determine the characteristics and importance of bursts. In this work, we analyse data from GASTON-GP programme, which mapped a 2.4 square degrees region of the Galactic plane (centred at l = 24 deg) at 1.15 and 2.00 mm using NIKA2 on the IRAM 30 m telescope. The survey obtained 11 epochs over four years, offering the first opportunity to study millimetre variability in a large sample of massive protostellar sources. From the combined dataset, we constructed catalogues of 2925 compact sources at 1.15 mm and 1713 at 2.00 mm. Using a dedicated relative calibration scheme, we generated millimetre light curves for around 200 high-signal-to-noise sources and identified one variable candidate. However, it is not protostellar. Consequently, we report no robust detections of variable protostellar sources in GASTON field. This is the direct consequence of observational limitations (i.e., sensitivity, resolution) combined with the lack of any 100-fold luminosity bursts during the observations, which is consistent with estimates inferred from isolated core collapse simulations. This study highlights the need for future high-resolution, high-cadence surveys to constrain the accretion histories of massive protostars.

AI.tldr: 通过GASTON-GP项目对银河系平面区域进行多波段毫米波监测，首次在大质量原恒星样本中未检测到显著变源，表明观测期间未发生百倍级光度爆发（luminosity bursts），印证了孤立核坍缩模拟的预期，凸显了未来高分辨率高频次巡天的必要性。
AI.background: 研究主题为原恒星（protostellar）质量增长的物理过程，重点关注大质量原恒星（high-mass protostars）的间歇性吸积（episodic accretion）现象及其毫米波（millimetre）变率观测。
AI.data: 数据来源于GASTON-GP项目，该项目使用IRAM 30米望远镜上的NIKA2设备在1.15和2.00毫米波段对银道面（中心位置l = 24度）2.4平方度区域进行了11个历元（历时四年）的观测，构建了包含2925个1.15毫米和1713个2.00毫米致密源（compact sources）的星表，并从中筛选约200个高信噪比（high-signal-to-noise）源生成毫米波光变曲线。
AI.method: 采用NIKA2仪器在IRAM 30米望远镜上对银道面区域进行1.15和2.00毫米多历元观测，结合专用相对校准方案构建毫米波光变曲线。
AI.result: 在GASTON-GP观测区域内未发现可靠的变光原恒星源（protostellar sources），这与孤立核塌缩模拟（isolated core collapse simulations）推断的爆发频率一致。

title: Neural blind deconvolution to reconstruct high-resolution ground-based solar observations
summary: Ground-based solar observations enable unprecedented spatial, spectral, and temporal resolution of the lower solar atmosphere, yet Earths turbulent atmosphere imposes significant limitations, requiring advanced post-facto image reconstruction. State-of-the-art reconstruction methods are based on restoring a burst of short exposure frames to a single observation. Limitations of these techniques arise due to the sparse information about the atmospheric point spread function (PSF) that degrade the observations and consequently the quality of reconstructions. We develop a novel image reconstruction method to achieve unprecedented spatial resolution from short exposure image bursts. This can provide high-quality reconstructions and therefore advance the study of the smallest spatial scales from the solar photosphere to the chromosphere. In this study, we present a novel approach for high-resolution solar image reconstruction based on physics-informed neural networks. In the training process, the neural network maps coordinate points directly to their corresponding intensity values while simultaneously updating the PSF parameters. The method convolves the true object from the neural network with the estimated PSFs and optimizes the network by minimizing the loss between the synthesized and real short-exposure image burst. This approach enables the simultaneous estimation of both the degrading PSF and the real high-resolution intensity distribution. We demonstrate the method on synthetic intensity data derived from a radiative MHD simulation and apply it to high-resolution observations from GREGOR and DKIST. Our results demonstrate the ability to reconstruct small-scale solar features that exceed the reconstruction performance of state-of-the-art reconstruction methods. With this approach we lay the foundation for future spatially varying PSFs.

AI.tldr: 基于物理信息神经网络（physics-informed neural networks）开发的新型图像重建方法，通过同时估计大气点扩散函数（PSF）和真实高分辨率强度分布，显著提升了地基太阳观测中对光球层至色球层（photosphere to chromosphere）微小结构的重建精度，超越了现有最优方法。
AI.background: 地基太阳观测虽能获取低层太阳大气前所未有的空间、光谱和时间分辨率，但地球湍流大气引入的像差限制了观测质量，需依赖先进的事后图像重建技术突破分辨率极限。
AI.data: 数据来源包括合成强度数据（源自辐射磁流体力学模拟（radiative MHD simulation））以及来自GREGOR和DKIST的高分辨率观测数据。
AI.method: 基于物理信息神经网络（physics-informed neural networks）的端到端图像重建方法，通过同步更新点扩散函数（PSF）参数并最小化合成图像与实际短曝光图像序列的损失函数，实现高分辨率太阳图像重建。
AI.result: 开发了一种基于物理信息神经网络的新型图像重建方法，能同时估计退化点扩散函数（PSF）和真实高分辨率强度分布，显著提升了对太阳光球层至色球层最小空间尺度特征的重建性能。

title: Resolving the sub-parsec circumnuclear density profiles of quiescent galaxies: Evidence for Bondi accretion flows in tidal disruption event hosts
comment: 21 pages, 11 figures. Submitted to ApJ, comments welcome. Both authors contributed equally
summary: The sub-parsec circumnuclear density profiles of galaxies represent a key element in our understanding of the accretion history and fuel availability of supermassive black holes (SMBHs). Observations that directly resolve sub-parsec scales in galaxies require extremely high resolution and generally hot (bright) environments, making this impossible in all but the nearest active galaxies. Transient accretion events onto previously quiescent SMBHs, such as a tidal disruption event (TDE), offer a new avenue to understand SMBHs and their environments. Radio-bright outflows from TDEs directly probe the ambient density at $10^{-3}-1$ pc scales, allowing direct constraints on the circumnuclear density of TDE host galaxies (i.e., quiescent galaxies). Here we present, using radio observations of a sample of 11 TDE hosts, a new methodology for fitting observed TDE radio emission to constrain their sub-parsec circumnuclear density profiles. Our findings reveal that TDE host galaxies exhibit circumnuclear density profiles remarkably consistent with the expectations of a simple Bondi accretion flow ($n_e\propto R^{-3/2}$). Under the assumption of a Bondi profile, we present a new method to jointly fit the outflow mass and ambient densities, in order to constrain the Bondi accretion rate and temperature. For the TDE host galaxies in our sample, we constrain a sample average Bondi accretion rate Eddington fraction of $\log_{10}f_{\rm{Edd}} = -3.96^{+0.30}_{-0.38}$ (as well as individual fits to each host). This work provides a methodology by which radio observations of TDEs can provide powerful constraints on the sub-parsec density distribution of quiescent SMBHs -- well inside the Bondi sphere. This opens up a new observational avenue to constrain sub-parsec gas distributions in a broad range of galaxies.

AI.tldr: 通过11个潮汐瓦解事件(TDE)宿主星系的射电观测，提出了一种新方法拟合其亚秒差距核周密度分布，发现这些星系核周密度分布与简单邦迪吸积流($n_e\propto R^{-3/2}$)预期高度一致，并据此约束了样本平均邦迪吸积率爱丁顿分数为$\log_{10}f_{\rm{Edd}} = -3.96^{+0.30}_{-0.38}$。
AI.background: 星系亚秒差距(parsec)尺度核周密度分布是理解超大质量黑洞(SMBH)吸积历史和燃料供给的关键因素。
AI.data: 研究使用了11个潮汐瓦解事件（TDE）宿主星系的射电观测数据，通过拟合观测到的TDE射电辐射来限制亚秒差距尺度下的核周密度分布。
AI.method: 采用射电观测数据拟合潮汐瓦解事件(TDE)的核周密度分布，基于邦迪吸积流(Bondi accretion flow)模型（$n_e\propto R^{-3/2}$）联合约束外流物质质量与环境密度。
AI.result: 利用潮汐瓦解事件(TDE)的射电观测数据，发现TDE宿主星系的亚秒差距(parsec)核周密度分布与简单邦迪(Bondi)吸积流($n_e\propto R^{-3/2}$)预期高度吻合。

title: Surprising increase of electron temperature in metal-rich star-forming region
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, submitted to ApJL. Comments are welcome
summary: The electron temperature is a crucial parameter for the determination of the gas-phase metallicity of galaxies. Low electron temperature is expected for metal-rich galaxies, theoretically. We report the discovery that temperature, as measured through auroral-to-strong line ratios of O$^+$, trends in reverse directions at 12+log(O/H) $\geq$ 8.7. This trend remains consistent regardless of the emission line fitting method employed and is not attributable to contamination or dust attenuation correction. Notably, this phenomenon is not observed in other low-ionization ions, such as S$^+$ and N$^+$, which also probe electron temperature. The results are verified in two independent datasets. We analyze the potential cause for the high [OII] auroral-to-strong line ratios at high metallicities, finding that no specific reason could account for that. This finding challenges the fundamental principles of the direct $T_e$ method for metallicity measurement, warranting further investigation into its physical interpretation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在金属丰度（12+log(O/H)）≥8.7的星系中，通过O$^+$的极光-强线比测得的电子温度（electron temperature）呈现与理论预期相反的上升趋势，且该现象未在S$^+$和N$^+$等其他低电离离子中观测到，这一结果对直接$T_e$法测量金属丰度的基本原理提出了挑战。
AI.background: 电子温度是测定星系气相金属丰度的关键参数，理论上金属丰度高的星系应具有较低的电子温度。
AI.data: 数据来源于两个独立的数据集（two independent datasets），通过测量O$^+$的极光-强线比（auroral-to-strong line ratios）来获取电子温度（electron temperature）信息。
AI.method: 采用氧离子（O$^+$）的极光线与强线比值测量电子温度（electron temperature），并通过对比不同电离态离子（如S$^+$和N$^+$）的数据验证异常趋势。
AI.result: 在金属丰度(12+log(O/H))≥8.7的星系中，通过O$^+$的极光-强线比测得的电子温度呈现与理论预期相反的上升趋势。

title: TILARA: Template-Independent Line-by-line Algorithm for Radial velocity Analysis. I. Description of the code and application on a Sun-like star
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Precise radial velocities (RVs) are commonly derived through cross-correlation or template-matching methods, both of which rely on a reference spectrum that can introduce biases when the data are variable, contaminated, or sparsely sampled. Line-by-line methods offer an alternative way to compute RVs but generally still rely on template creation and therefore share its inherent limitations. We introduce TILARA, a template-independent, line-by-line RV extraction code designed to allow us to derive line-by-line RVs and to operate effectively even when spectral template construction is not recommended. While originally motivated by future PoET disk-resolved solar observations, TILARA has been built with the flexibility to work with different stellar spectral types and instruments. A curated list of individual absorption lines is used as a reference to automatically measure line centers with via Gaussian fitting with ARES. Then, using the reference lines list, and the lines measured with ARES on the spectra of the target star, TILARA computes the RVs and applies configurable outlier rejection through sigma-clipping or down-weighting methods. We tested different configurations of the code, RV uncertainty estimation methods, and line selection criteria. The code was applied to 520 ESPRESSO observations of the Sun-like star HD 102365 to evaluate its performance. TILARA was then tested against other RV extraction methods. Both in its sigma-clipping and its down-weighting mode, TILARA provided resulting RV time-series with similar standard deviation and error bars as the ones derived using existing methods that follow different approaches.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了一种不依赖模板的逐线径向速度（RV）提取方法TILARA，通过高斯拟合自动测量吸收线中心并计算RV，在太阳型恒星HD 102365的ESPRESSO观测数据中表现出与现有方法相当的精度和稳定性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于开发一种不依赖模板的逐线径向速度（RV）提取方法（TILARA），以克服传统基于参考光谱的交叉相关或模板匹配方法在数据可变、受污染或稀疏采样时引入的偏差问题。
AI.data: 数据来源于520次ESPRESSO（高分辨率光谱仪）对类太阳恒星HD 102365的观测。
AI.method: 采用高斯拟合（Gaussian fitting）自动测量吸收线中心，并通过可配置的离群值剔除方法（如sigma-clipping或down-weighting）计算视向速度（RVs）。
AI.result: 开发了一种不依赖模板（template-independent）的逐线（line-by-line）径向速度（RV）提取代码TILARA，能在不推荐构建光谱模板时有效运行，并通过高斯拟合自动测量线心，经测试其提取的RV时间序列与现有方法结果精度相当。

title: A FAST Survey of H I Absorption in Low-power Radio Sources
comment: 20 pages, 8 figures, accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: We conducted a HI 21cm absorption study of a sample of 147 nearby (z < 0.1) low-power radio sources with $10\,\mathrm{mJy} < S_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}} < 30\,\mathrm{mJy}$ and $\log(P_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}}/\mathrm{W\,Hz^{-1}}) = 20.5-23.7$, using the Five-hundred-meter Aperture Spherical radio Telescope. By investigating the origin and kinematics of HI absorbing gas, we aim to study the interplay between the active galactic nucleus (AGN) and its surrounding interstellar medium. Our observations detect 12 new absorbers, combining results from the pilot survey (three absorbers out of 26 sources), yielding a detection rate of $\sim10.2^{+3.1}_{-2.0}\%$. The detection rate in our sample is lower than in higher-power samples, which is likely due to emission dilution and the dominance of extended sources, indicating a gas-rich and star-forming-dominated population in low-power sources. Among new detections, most line profiles are narrow and show velocities close to systemic ones, consistent with rotating disks, while four show disturbed kinematics indicative of inflows or outflows. The fraction of outflow candidates rises with radio power, while the fraction of inflow ones remains constant, suggesting the effect of radio emission on driving HI outflows. In our sample, compact sources show a higher HI detection rate than extended sources. Contrary to expectations from higher-power samples, MIR-bright sources at low-power radio do not exhibit a higher HI detection rate or more disturbed kinematics. In low-power radio sources, blueshifted absorption occurs only in Seyferts and low-ionization nuclear emitting regions, indicating the connection between atomic outflows and the ionization state of AGN.

AI.tldr: 通过对147个邻近(z < 0.1)低功率射电源(10 mJy < S<sub>1.4 GHz</sub> < 30 mJy)的HI 21厘米吸收线研究，发现低功率源中气体丰富且以恒星形成为主导，探测率为10.2%，其中多数吸收线轮廓窄且速度接近系统速度，符合旋转盘特征，但有四例显示扰动运动学特征(流入或流出)，且流出比例随射电功率增加而上升，同时紧凑源比延展源具有更高的HI探测率，而中红外(MIR)亮源未表现出更高探测率或更扰动运动学，且蓝移吸收仅出现在塞弗特星系和低电离核区(LINERs)中，表明原子流出与活动星系核(AGN)电离状态相关。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于低功率射电源（low-power radio sources）中中性氢（HI）吸收气体的起源与运动学特征，旨在揭示活动星系核（AGN）与周围星际介质的相互作用机制。
AI.data: 数据来源于使用五百米口径球面射电望远镜（Five-hundred-meter Aperture Spherical radio Telescope）对147个邻近（红移z < 0.1）低功率射电源（1.4 GHz流量密度10-30 mJy、对数功率20.5-23.7 W/Hz）进行的HI 21厘米吸收线观测，包括先导巡天（26个源中3个探测）和后续观测共发现12个新吸收体。
AI.method: 采用五百米口径球面射电望远镜（FAST）对147个近邻低功率射电源进行中性氢（HI）21厘米吸收线研究，结合先导巡天数据分析了吸收气体的起源与运动学特征。
AI.result: 在低功率射电源样本中探测到12个新的HI 21厘米吸收体，总探测率为~10.2^{+3.1}_{-2.0}\%，表明低功率源中存在气体丰富且以恒星形成为主导的群体。

title: Coexistence of Chromatic Flares and an Achromatic QPO in the Gamma-ray Blazar PG 1553+113
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, 1 table; Accepted by A&A Letters
summary: The physical origin of quasi-periodic oscillations (QPOs) in blazars remains debated, with geometric and plasma-driven scenarios as the main competing interpretations. Discriminating between them requires probing variability beyond flux periodicity. We study the spectral evolution of the BL Lac object PG 1553+113 over its 2.2-year gamma-ray QPO cycle to constrain the mechanism driving the oscillation. In particular, we test whether the variability is chromatic (coupled to spectral changes) or achromatic (independent of spectral shape), allowing us to distinguish between plasma-driven and geometric scenarios. We analyze 17 years of Fermi-LAT data (2008-2025) with 30-day binning. To mitigate red-noise effects, we apply Singular Spectrum Analysis (SSA) to remove slow baseline trends and use a Block Bootstrap approach to quantify correlations between photon flux and photon index while preserving temporal dependence. We find a robust softer-when-brighter chromatic trend, atypical for high-synchrotron-peaked blazars such as PG 1553+113 and which, based on our analysis, physically corresponds to softer-when-flaring episodes, that persists after detrending and accounting for temporal autocorrelation. In contrast, no significant correlation is detected between the photon index and the QPO phase, indicating that the periodic modulation is effectively achromatic. The coexistence of plasma-driven chromatic flares and an achromatic QPO disfavors scenarios in which the periodicity arises from intrinsic jet processes. Instead, the results support a geometric origin for the QPO modulation, such as jet precession, where Doppler-factor variations modulate the flux without altering the intrinsic particle energy distribution.

AI.tldr: 通过对BL Lac天体PG 1553+113长达17年的伽马射线准周期振荡(QPO)研究，发现其存在与耀斑相关的"越亮越软"色变趋势，但QPO调制本身是非色变的，支持喷流进动等几何机制而非等离子体过程解释QPO起源。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于耀变体中准周期振荡（QPOs）的物理起源争议，主要探讨几何驱动与等离子体驱动两种竞争性解释机制的区分问题。
AI.data: 数据来源于费米大面积望远镜（Fermi-LAT）2008至2025年期间观测的伽马射线数据，采用30天时间分段处理。
AI.method: 采用奇异谱分析（SSA）去除慢基线趋势，并结合块自助法（Block Bootstrap）量化光子流量与光子指数间的相关性，同时保留时间依赖性。
AI.result: 在PG 1553+113中观测到的准周期振荡（QPO）具有非色散性特征，且与等离子体驱动的色散性耀变无关，支持其几何起源（如喷流进动）而非喷流内禀过程。

title: Spectral Hardening Revealed by Geometric De-boosting in the Masked Jet of PKS 2155$-$304
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures; Submitted to A&A Letters
summary: Blazar gamma-ray variability is predominantly stochastic and well described by red-noise processes. However, a subset of sources exhibits quasi-periodic oscillations (QPOs) on year-long timescales, whose physical origin remains debated. In high-synchrotron-peaked (HSP) blazars, departures from a single power-law gamma-ray spectrum, manifested as high-energy upturns in the GeV band, may probe emission mechanisms and the intrinsic duty cycle. We investigate the link between the 1.7 yr gamma-ray QPO in PKS 2155-304 and an exceptional spectral hardening event identified in the Fermi-LAT HSP blazar population. We analyze 18 years of Fermi-LAT data using 30-day binning, applying Singular Spectrum Analysis to mitigate red-noise effects and a Moving Block Bootstrap approach to quantify the correlation between photon flux and photon index. We find a statistically significant softer-when-brighter chromatic trend, supporting a geometric origin of the flux modulation. The spectral hardening event is phase-locked to the QPO trough, implying that the hardening signature is detectable only when geometrically boosted soft emission is suppressed at the flux minimum. We propose a Geometric Masking scenario in which jet geometry regulates the visibility of acceleration processes. These results favor a two-component jet structure and suggest that spectral hardening during low-flux states, even in non-periodic sources, may reveal jet physics otherwise obscured by relativistic amplification.

AI.tldr: 研究发现PKS 2155-304耀变体(blazar)的1.7年伽马射线准周期振荡(QPO)与光谱硬化事件相位锁定，支持几何掩蔽模型(Geometric Masking)解释两成分喷流结构，表明低流量状态的光谱硬化可揭示被相对论放大掩盖的喷流物理机制。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于耀变体(blazar)伽马射线光变中准周期振荡(QPOs)的物理起源及其与能谱硬化的关联，旨在揭示喷流几何结构对辐射过程的调制机制。
AI.data: 数据来源于费米大面积望远镜(Fermi-LAT)对PKS 2155-304长达18年的观测数据，采用30天时间分箱处理。
AI.method: 采用奇异谱分析（Singular Spectrum Analysis）抑制红噪声效应，并结合移动区块自助法（Moving Block Bootstrap）量化光子通量与光子指数的相关性。
AI.result: 在PKS 2155-304中发现的1.7年伽马射线准周期振荡（QPO）与光谱硬化事件相位锁定，支持几何掩蔽模型（Geometric Masking）解释喷流结构对加速过程可见性的调控作用。

title: Geometric masking in AGN jets and its implications for unification and blazar physics
comment: Submitted to RNAAS
summary: We explore the implications of the recently proposed Geometric Masking scenario for the Active Galactic Nuclei (AGN) Unification Scheme, the blazar sequence, and broader blazar phenomenology, and assess its consistency with recent observations. Phase-resolved analysis of PKS 2155$-$304 shows that extreme GeV spectral hardening events are locked to the trough of its $\sim 1.7$ yr quasi-periodic oscillation, indicating that high-flux states are dominated by a soft, geometrically amplified envelope that outshines an underlying hard core. Independent support comes from the detection of TeV emission in the FSRQs S5 1027+74 and 3C 273 when integrating over low-flux states, revealing hard spectra inconsistent with a purely cooling-dominated interpretation. We argue that Doppler boosting preferentially enhances the soft component when the jet is closely aligned, creating a visibility bias that extends the AGN Unification Scheme and introduces a geometric modulation layer within the blazar sequence. In this framework, low-flux states correspond to windows of geometric transparency rather than intrinsic quiescence, and misaligned systems act as permanently unmasked laboratories of particle acceleration. The scenario implies that the duty cycle of extreme acceleration in AGN jets is substantially higher than inferred from flux-selected observations.

AI.tldr: 研究发现活动星系核（AGN）统一模型（Unification Scheme）和耀变体序列（blazar sequence）中的极端GeV谱硬化事件与准周期振荡（quasi-periodic oscillation）相位锁定，提出几何掩蔽（Geometric Masking）导致多普勒增强（Doppler boosting）优先放大软成分，揭示低流量态对应几何透明窗口而非本征静止，表明AGN喷流极端加速的占空比（duty cycle）远高于流量选择观测的推断值。
AI.background: 该研究探讨了几何遮蔽（Geometric Masking）情景对活动星系核（AGN）统一模型、耀变体序列（blazar sequence）及更广泛耀变体现象学的影响，并评估其与近期观测结果的一致性。
AI.data: data来源包括PKS 2155$-$304的相位分辨分析数据、FSRQs S5 1027+74和3C 273在低通量状态下积分探测到的TeV辐射数据。
AI.method: 采用相位分辨分析(phase-resolved analysis)和几何掩蔽(Geometric Masking)框架分析耀变体序列(blazar sequence)中的几何调制层(geometric modulation layer)。
AI.result: 多普勒增强（Doppler boosting）优先放大软成分时喷流紧密对准，产生能见度偏差（visibility bias），从而扩展活动星系核（AGN）统一模型并在耀变体序列中引入几何调制层。

title: Stellar contents and Star Formation in IRAS 18456-0223
comment: 17 pages with 16 figures
summary: We use various analytical techniques to study Young Stellar Objects (YSOs) in an area of approximately $10' \times 10'$ in the IRAS 18456-0223 star-forming region. We use archival optical (Gaia DR3) and infrared (2MASS, UKIDSS, Spitzer, WISE, and Herschel) data, along with our optical spectroscopy of three bright stars for this purpose. We identify 89 YSOs (80 Class II and 9 Class I) based on their infrared properties. Our multiwavelength SED fits of selected YSOs show that they have masses $\sim 0.1$--$7.2$ $M_\odot$ and are up to $4$ Myr old. Our Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) analysis shows that these YSOs, situated at around 600 pc, form clusters with radial extents of order 0.5 pc and mean surface densities of $\sim 60$ pc$^{-2}$. We compare UKIDSS and 2MASS data of the YSOs and find that some of them show variability. We construct maps based on Herschel data which reveal multiple column density peaks ($N_{\rm H_2} \sim 10^{22}$ cm$^{-2}$) embedded in cold ($T_d \sim 10$--$13$ K) filaments. Our near-infrared extinction map exhibits several high-$A_V$ peaks, some of which coincide with the sub-mm column density maxima. Using our optical spectra of three bright sources, we show that they are of A--K spectral type. One star shows the Li I 6707 Å line, indicating its youth.

AI.tldr: 通过多波段数据分析在IRAS 18456-0223恒星形成区（距离约600 pc）发现89颗年轻恒星体（YSOs），其质量范围为0.1-7.2太阳质量、年龄不超过4 Myr，并揭示这些YSOs形成径向尺度约0.5 pc、平均表面密度约60 pc⁻²的星团，同时探测到多个柱密度峰值（N_H₂∼10²² cm⁻²）的冷丝状结构（尘埃温度10-13 K）及近红外消光峰。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用多波段观测数据解析IRAS 18456-0223恒星形成区中年轻恒星天体（YSOs）的物理特性及其空间分布。
AI.data: 数据来源包括档案光学数据（盖亚卫星DR3）和红外数据（2MASS、UKIDSS、斯皮策、WISE和赫歇尔），以及自行获取的三颗亮星的光学光谱数据。
AI.method: 基于红外特性识别年轻恒星天体（YSOs），采用多波段光谱能量分布（SED）拟合确定质量与年龄，利用最小生成树（MST）分析空间分布，并通过赫歇尔（Herschel）数据构建柱密度与温度分布图。
AI.result: 在IRAS 18456-0223恒星形成区约10'×10'区域内发现了89颗年轻恒星天体（YSOs），包括80颗II类和9颗I类天体。
